concern: CAMERA & WORLD RENDERING in /workspaces/abduct_a_chameleon/index.html — cam/camFollow/camPan/zoom pipeline, INSPECT zoom-out, FX camera (lookahead/zoom-punch/trauma shake), applyWorldTransform/screenToWorld projection pair, visRect culling, terrain-cache blitting, and the frame() draw order — mapped so free pan+zoom (wheel/pinch), camera-lock, and eased camera-state transitions can be added without breaking tap accuracy.

stateObjects.name: cam
stateObjects.role: THE single projection input: true rendered world-center in world px. Written ONLY by updateCamera step (4) (clamped camFollow+camPan) plus hard snaps in startRound (2093, 2102). Everything render-side (applyWorldTransform, screenToWorld, worldToScreen, visRect) reads cam and nothing else.
stateObjects.fields: {x, y} world px

stateObjects.name: zoom
stateObjects.role: Current effective scale (world px -> CSS px). Declared `let cam={x:0,y:0}, zoom=1.6, shake={...}`. REBUILT EVERY FRAME in updateCamera line 1376 from zoomBase*(1+FX.zoomPunch)*(1+(INSPECT_ZOOM_MUL-1)*inspectZoomT), floored at ZOOM_MIN*0.8. Also assigned in computeZoom(). A user-zoom must become a new factor in the 1376 product, not a direct write.

stateObjects.name: zoomBase
stateObjects.role: Fit-to-viewport base zoom, set only by computeZoom() (min(vpW,vpH)/(TARGET_VISIBLE_TILES*TILE) clamped ZOOM_MIN..ZOOM_MAX). Reset on every resize()/dpr retier.
stateObjects.fields: number; `let shakeScale=1, zoomBase=1.6`

stateObjects.name: camFollow
stateObjects.role: Eased follow anchor (player + smoothed lookahead), deadzoned + exponentially eased toward target in updateCamera step (2). Never read by projections directly — cam = clamp(camFollow + camPan).
stateObjects.fields: const {x, y} world px

stateObjects.name: camPan
stateObjects.role: Right-thumb peek/free-look offset in WORLD units, added to camFollow. Grabbed 1:1 via /zoom in onPointerMove; springs home in MOVE (PAN_HOME_RATE=8), held in INSPECT, forced 0 in PAINT. Zeroed at ~9 reset sites (891, 1050, 1053, 1791, 2053, 2058, 2060, 2119).
stateObjects.fields: const {x, y} world px

stateObjects.name: inspectZoomT
stateObjects.role: 0..1 ease into seeker-altitude zoom-out; driven every frame toward (ctrlMode==='INSPECT'?1:0) at INSPECT_ZOOM_RATE=6 (line 1375). Gates drawInspectOverlay (>0.01). This is the existing template for an eased camera-state transition.
stateObjects.fields: let number 0..1

stateObjects.name: ctrlMode
stateObjects.role: 'MOVE' | 'PAINT' | 'INSPECT' — selects pan clamp (MOVE_PEEK_MAX=224 vs INSPECT_PAN_MAX=384), pan spring-home behavior, lookahead on/off, inspect zoom target, and movement nudge speed.
stateObjects.fields: let string

stateObjects.name: shake
stateObjects.role: Trauma screen-shake offset in CSS px. Applied ONLY inside applyWorldTransform's translate — deliberately EXCLUDED from screenToWorld/worldToScreen so taps stay exact (comment at 1395).
stateObjects.fields: {mag, x, y}

stateObjects.name: FX
stateObjects.role: FX-camera state: trauma (shake energy), zoomPunch (additive zoom factor tweened by punchZoom), camLeadX/camLeadY (smoothed velocity lookahead), hitstop/slowScale (affect simDt but NOT updateCamera), tweens[] (generic tween queue run by updateTweens on realDt), flash/desat/spottedV/reliefV (post overlays).
stateObjects.fields: {trauma, hitstop, zoomPunch, slowScale, slowHold, desat, spottedV, reliefV, camLeadX, camLeadY, tweens[], streaks[], flash}

stateObjects.name: camera tuning constants
stateObjects.role: TARGET_VISIBLE_TILES=16, ZOOM_MIN=1.15, ZOOM_MAX=2.6, CAM_STIFFNESS=9.0, CAM_DEADZONE=6 (lines 89-90); MOVE_PEEK_MAX=224, INSPECT_PAN_MAX=384, PAN_HOME_RATE=8, RECENTER_SHOW=40 (line 41); INSPECT_NUDGE=45, INSPECT_ZOOM_MUL=0.78, INSPECT_ZOOM_RATE=6 (line 42); CAM_LOOK_K=0.16, CAM_LOOK_MAX=46, CAM_LOOK_SMOOTH=5.0, SHAKE_MAXOFF=15, TRAUMA_DECAY=1.9 (line 1300).
stateObjects.fields: consts

stateObjects.name: viewport globals
stateObjects.role: `let cv, ctx, dpr=1, vpW=0, vpH=0` — CSS-px viewport + devicePixelRatio (capped by dprCap, line 91; retiered at runtime by applyQuality 413-420 which calls resize()). All projections mix vpW/vpH (CSS px) with dpr only inside setTransform.
stateObjects.fields: cv canvas, ctx, dpr, vpW, vpH

stateObjects.name: world dimensions
stateObjects.role: `let mapCols, mapRows, worldW, worldH` set in setActiveMap (line 277: worldW=mapCols*TILE). Drive cam clamping (1393-1394), player clamping, and terrain-blit bounds. New maps automatically feed the camera via these.
stateObjects.fields: numbers, world px; TILE=32 (line 32)

stateObjects.name: pointers / joystick
stateObjects.role: pointers: Map pointerId -> {sx,sy,role,...}; roles: 'joystick'|'pan'|'ui'|'sv'|'hue'|'reticle'|'sscroll'. 'pan' entries carry sx0/sy0/px0/py0 for the 1:1 grab. updateCamera scans pointers for an active 'pan' role to suppress spring-home. joystick (752) owns the movement-side thumb.
stateObjects.fields: Map + let joystick {id,cx,cy,dx,dy,mag}

stateObjects.name: terrainCanvas / terrainCtx
stateObjects.role: Full-world offscreen canvas (worldW x worldH px, 1 world px = 1 canvas px) baked once per map by buildTerrainCache (290-309). Blitted per-frame with a visRect-culled source slab (1416-1419).
stateObjects.fields: OffscreenCanvas|HTMLCanvasElement

stateObjects.name: skyCache / vignette caches
stateObjects.role: skyCache: viewport-sized screen-space gradient rebuilt by buildSky() on resize/biome change; vignetteGrad/scanlinePattern caches invalidated in resize() (_vigGrad=null line 2617). Screen-space — unaffected by zoom, must be rebuilt on viewport change only.
stateObjects.fields: canvases / gradients

stateObjects.name: _hud
stateObjects.role: {modeButtons[], pill, recenter} — screen rects exposed to window.__aac.hud for the jsdom smoke harness; recenter is set only while |camPan|>RECENTER_SHOW.
stateObjects.fields: const object

stateObjects.name: window.__aac state hook
stateObjects.role: Test/diagnostic getter exposing mode:ctrlMode, cam, camFollow, camPan, zoom (3dp), inspect:{active,zoomT}, hud, perf:{dpr,dprCap,qLevel}. The jsdom smoke harness (per project memory) reads these — new camera state (userZoom, camLock) should be appended here.
stateObjects.fields: getter at 2641-2669

functions.name: updateCamera
functions.role: THE camera integrator, 4 numbered steps: (1) line 1375-1376 zoom = max(ZOOM_MIN*0.8, zoomBase*(1+FX.zoomPunch)*(1+(INSPECT_ZOOM_MUL-1)*inspectZoomT)) with inspectZoomT eased toward mode target; (2) 1377-1383 velocity lookahead (MOVE only) smoothed into FX.camLeadX/Y, then camFollow deadzone(6)+exponential ease 1-exp(-CAM_STIFFNESS*dt) toward player+lead; (3) 1384-1389 camPan policy per ctrlMode + clampPan; (4) 1390-1394 cam = clamp(camFollow+camPan, half-viewport..world-half) with center-when-world-smaller fallback; then 1395-1402 trauma shake offsets + FX decays. Runs on realDt AFTER the fixed-step sim (frame line 2601) — immune to hitstop/slow-mo. This is where free-zoom, camera-lock, and eased transitions all hook in.

functions.name: computeZoom
functions.role: zoomBase=clamp(Math.min(vpW,vpH)/(TARGET_VISIBLE_TILES*TILE),ZOOM_MIN,ZOOM_MAX); zoom=zoomBase. Called only from resize() (2616). Do not put user zoom here — it gets reset on resize and on runtime dpr retiers.

functions.name: applyWorldTransform
functions.role: ctx.setTransform(zoom*dpr,0,0,zoom*dpr,(vpW/2 - cam.x*zoom + shake.x)*dpr,(vpH/2 - cam.y*zoom + shake.y)*dpr). The forward projection; shake is a translate-only extra excluded from the inverse.

functions.name: applyScreenTransform
functions.role: ctx.setTransform(dpr,0,0,dpr,0,0) — screen-space (CSS px) mode for sky, HUD, overlays, post FX.

functions.name: screenToWorld
functions.role: cam.x + (sx-vpW/2)/zoom — exact inverse of applyWorldTransform minus shake. Consumers: studioReticleDrag (1111). Tap accuracy contract lives here.

functions.name: worldToScreen
functions.role: (wx-cam.x)*zoom+vpW/2 — used by drawInspectOverlay (1834, 1838); drawThreatArrows inlines the same math (1878).

functions.name: visRect
functions.role: World-space view rectangle from cam +- (vp/2)/zoom. Consumers: terrain blit (1414-1419), cover culling (1428), drawAmbientGround (385), spawnDrifter (370), updateAmbient (375). Automatically correct for any zoom value.

functions.name: clampPan
functions.role: Radially clamps camPan magnitude; called from onPointerMove (972) and updateCamera (1389) with mode-dependent max (INSPECT 384 vs MOVE 224).

functions.name: drawRound
functions.role: World render pass, exact order: (1) applyScreenTransform + skyCache blit; (2) applyWorldTransform + visRect; terrain slab blit; (3) ambient ground glows; (4) footstep ripples; (5) culled cover; (6) particles; TA beacons / HUNT branch; (7) decoys+player/abduction; (8) UFOs; ink clouds; (9) overhead drifters; (10) reticle; (11-14) applyScreenTransform + multiply color-grade + drawVignette. NOTE: alpha param is vestigial — called as drawRound() (2605); no interpolation exists.

functions.name: drawRoundHUD
functions.role: Rebuilds roundHits[] each frame (screen-space tap targets); MODE dock (1770-1776), MODE pill exit (1788), recenter button ⌖ when |camPan|>RECENTER_SHOW (1790-1791, zeroes camPan), ability bar; calls drawInspectOverlay when inspectZoomT>0.01 (1811).

functions.name: drawInspectOverlay
functions.role: Screen-space seeker's-view overlay faded by inspectZoomT: UFO scan rings via worldToScreen + SCAN_R*zoom (1836), YOU marker or edge arrow computed from player-cam angle (1842), blend readout panel.

functions.name: drawThreatArrows
functions.role: Off-screen hunter arrows; inlines worldToScreen math (line 1878: vpW/2+(u.x-cam.x)*zoom) for on-screen tests — a second copy of the projection to keep in sync if projection changes.

functions.name: onPointerDown
functions.role: Role router: roundHits screen-space hit test FIRST (945), then handedness split — joy side spawns floating joystick (950-953), other side becomes role:'pan' storing {sx0,sy0,px0:camPan.x,py0:camPan.y} (954-955), except HUNT mode ('ui'). Pinch/wheel roles hook in here.

functions.name: onPointerMove
functions.role: role 'pan' branch (970-972): camPan = px0 + (sx-sx0)/zoom (1:1 world grab at CURRENT zoom), then clampPan by mode. Pinch detection would branch here before per-role handling.

functions.name: onPointerUp
functions.role: Deletes pointer; pan release is implicit — updateCamera notices no 'pan' role remains and springs home in MOVE.

functions.name: enterInspect / exitInspect / toggleInspect
functions.signature: function enterInspect(); function exitInspect(); function toggleInspect()
functions.role: INSPECT transitions: enter guards (round PLAYING, not HUNT), closes studio, zeros camPan, sets ctrlMode='INSPECT' (zoom-out then happens purely via updateCamera easing). Triggers: KeyI (867), Esc exits (874), gamepad RB (832), HUD 👁 (1772), MODE pill (1788).

functions.name: enterPaint / exitPaint
functions.role: PAINT roots the player and zeros camPan (1050); updateCamera forces camPan=0 every frame while in PAINT (1385).

functions.name: punchZoom
functions.role: FX zoom-punch: tweens FX.zoomPunch up with easeOutCubic then back with easeInOutCubic via tw(); no-op when FX_MOTION<=0. Multiplied into zoom at 1376. Callers: dash 802, applyMatch 1065, spotted 1290, near-miss 1316, abduction 2056.

functions.name: addTrauma / trauma shake
functions.role: Accumulates FX.trauma (scaled by motion setting + shakeScale); updateCamera 1396-1398 converts trauma^2 into random shake.x/y within SHAKE_MAXOFF=15 and decays at TRAUMA_DECAY=1.9.

functions.name: tw / updateTweens
functions.role: Generic tween queue (cap 48) run on realDt in frame() (2590) — the ready-made tool for scripted camera transitions; easings easeOutCubic/easeInOutCubic at 161-162.

functions.name: buildTerrainCache
functions.role: Bakes the whole map to terrainCanvas (worldW x worldH, OffscreenCanvas fallback to canvas) once per map — per-tile base + terrainMotif texture. Blit source coords are world px; camera never touches this.

functions.name: resize
functions.role: dpr=min(dprCap,devicePixelRatio); vpW/vpH from window; sizes canvas backing store (vpW*dpr); calls computeZoom(); invalidates _vigGrad/_scanPat; rebuilds sky. Also invoked at runtime by applyQuality (420) and applySettingsRuntime (651) when dprCap retiers.

functions.name: frame
functions.role: Main rAF loop: realDt clamp (MAX_FRAME_DT=0.05) -> updatePerf/updateTweens/updateStreaks -> gamepad edges -> hitstop/slowScale gate simDt -> fixed-step while(acc>=DT_FIXED) stepSim(1/60) max 5 steps -> particles/ambient/anim -> updateCamera(realDt) -> drawRound() -> drawRoundHUD() -> drawStreaks -> flash -> drawToast.

functions.name: stepSim
functions.role: Fixed-step sim; line 2239: practice-mode slow-mo (STUDIO_SLOWMO=0.35) while studio open OR ctrlMode==='INSPECT'; movePlayer uses INSPECT_NUDGE=45 px/s while inspecting (1009).

functions.name: startRound
functions.role: Camera lifecycle: cam snapped to player (2093; HUNT re-snap 2102), acc=0; line 2119 resets ctrlMode='MOVE', camFollow=cam, camPan=0, inspectZoomT=0, joystick=null. Any new camera state (userZoom, camLock, transition timers) must be reset here.

functions.name: triggerAbduction / endRound / togglePause / blur handler
functions.role: The other camPan/ctrlMode reset sites: abduction, win, pause, and window blur all force ctrlMode='MOVE' + camPan=0. A camera-lock feature must decide its behavior at each.

functions.name: studioReticleDrag
functions.role: Only screenToWorld consumer: converts drag to world, clamps to 6*TILE radius around player. Canonical tap-accuracy client — a regression test target for any projection change.

functions.name: updatePerf / applyQuality
functions.role: Frame-budget auto-scaler; at qLevel>=2 lowers dprCap to 1.25 and calls resize() (420) — which re-runs computeZoom() and resets zoomBase mid-round. User zoom kept as a separate factor survives this; user zoom stored in zoomBase would not.

flows: FRAME ORDER (per rAF, frame() 2588): realDt clamp -> updatePerf/updateTweens (FX.zoomPunch tweens advance here, realDt) -> updateGamepadEdges -> simDt = hitstop? 0 : realDt*FX.slowScale -> fixed-step: while(acc>=1/60 && steps<5) stepSim(1/60) [gatherInput -> movePlayer -> camo] -> updateParticles/updateAmbient/updateChameleonAnim -> updateCamera(realDt) [camera ALWAYS full-rate, ignores hitstop/slow-mo] -> drawRound() [world pass] -> drawRoundHUD() [rebuild roundHits; drawInspectOverlay] -> drawStreaks -> white flash -> drawToast.

ZOOM PIPELINE: resize() 2614 (window resize, boot, dpr retier) -> computeZoom() 1372 sets zoomBase=clamp(min(vpW,vpH)/(16*32), 1.15, 2.6) -> every updateCamera: inspectZoomT += ((INSPECT?1:0)-inspectZoomT)*min(1,dt*6) -> zoom = max(1.15*0.8, zoomBase*(1+FX.zoomPunch)*(1+(0.78-1)*inspectZoomT)) [line 1376] -> zoom consumed by applyWorldTransform, screenToWorld, worldToScreen, visRect, pan grab ratio, SCAN_R ring radii.

TOUCH PAN (right thumb): onPointerDown 922 -> roundHits screen hit-test first (945, buttons win) -> non-joystick side && round.mode!=='HUNT' -> pointers.set(id,{role:'pan',sx0,sy0,px0:camPan.x,py0:camPan.y}) [955] -> onPointerMove 970: camPan = p.px0+(sx-sx0)/zoom (1:1 world grab), clampPan(INSPECT?384:224) -> updateCamera step (3): PAINT forces camPan=0; MOVE with no live 'pan' pointer springs home camPan *= via 1-exp(-8*dt), snap to 0 below 0.5; INSPECT holds -> step (4): cam = clamp(camFollow+camPan, halfView..world-halfView) or world-center when world fits -> render. Release: onPointerUp deletes pointer; spring-home takes over next updateCamera.

FOLLOW + LOOKAHEAD: updateCamera step (2): lead gate = (ctrlMode==='MOVE')?1:0 -> target lead = clamp(player.vx*0.16, +-46)*gate -> FX.camLeadX/Y ease toward it at rate 5 -> follow target tx,ty = player + camLead -> if dist>CAM_DEADZONE(6): camFollow += (t-camFollow)*(1-exp(-9*dt)). PAINT/INSPECT freeze lookahead to 0 (eases out), so entering those modes already glides the camera back over the player.

INSPECT ZOOM-OUT: KeyI 867 / RB 832 / HUD 👁 1772 -> toggleInspect 1056 -> enterInspect 1052 (guards PLAYING && !HUNT; closes studio; camPan=0; ctrlMode='INSPECT') -> updateCamera eases inspectZoomT->1 at rate 6 -> zoom scales toward 0.78x zoomBase -> movePlayer nudges at 45 px/s (1009); practice runs at 0.35x time (2239) -> drawRoundHUD calls drawInspectOverlay 1831 (alpha=inspectZoomT): scan rings worldToScreen + SCAN_R*zoom, YOU ring/edge-arrow, readout -> exitInspect 1054 -> inspectZoomT eases back to 0; pan clamp shrinks 384->224 (clampPan at 1389).

FX CAMERA: addTrauma(a) 1304 accumulates FX.trauma -> updateCamera 1396: shake.x/y = random +-15*trauma^2, decays 1.9/s -> applied ONLY as translate in applyWorldTransform (1405), never in screenToWorld. punchZoom(amt,rise,fall) 1310 -> tw() tween on FX.zoomPunch (easeOutCubic up, easeInOutCubic down) -> multiplied into zoom at 1376. Both are transient multipliers/offsets layered ON TOP of the deterministic cam/zoomBase state.

TERRAIN BLIT (drawRound 1414-1419): v=visRect() -> sx=max(0,floor(v.x0)), sy=max(0,floor(v.y0)), sw=min(worldW,ceil(v.x1))-sx, sh likewise -> if(sw>0&&sh>0) ctx.drawImage(terrainCanvas, sx,sy,sw,sh, sx,sy,sw,sh) under the WORLD transform (source rect == dest rect in world coords, so the transform does all scaling). Follows pan/zoom automatically via cam->visRect; guards already make extreme zoom-out safe.

TAP ACCURACY CHAIN: pointer event (CSS px, e.clientX) -> screen-space roundHits/inRect tests (no transform involved) -> world interactions go through screenToWorld 769 = cam.x+(sx-vpW/2)/zoom -> exact inverse of applyWorldTransform minus shake (shake excluded on purpose, comment 1395). Currently only studioReticleDrag converts taps to world; UFO rings/YOU marker go world->screen via worldToScreen. Any new zoom factor keeps taps exact automatically IF it is folded into `zoom` before both the transform and the inverse read it in the same frame.

ROUND/CAMERA LIFECYCLE: startRound 2072 -> cam.x/y = player spawn (2093; HUNT 2102), acc=0 -> line 2119: ctrlMode='MOVE', camFollow=cam, camPan=0, inspectZoomT=0 -> COUNTDOWN -> PLAYING. Resets that also zero camPan+mode: blur 890, triggerAbduction 2053, endRound 2058, togglePause 2060, spotted-kickout 1292. Recenter: drawRoundHUD 1790 shows ⌖ only while |camPan|>40; tap zeroes camPan (spring not needed).

RUNTIME DPR RETIER (perf): updatePerf 409 EMA>20ms x30 frames -> qLevel++ -> applyQuality 413 -> at qLevel>=2 dprCap->1.25 -> resize() -> computeZoom() resets zoomBase (and current zoom until next updateCamera) mid-round; also settings.perf changes (651). Sky/vignette caches rebuilt; cam/camFollow/camPan untouched.
invariants: screenToWorld/worldToScreen (769-770) MUST remain the exact inverse/forward of applyWorldTransform (1404) minus shake. Shake stays a translate-only offset that never enters the inverse — this is the tap-accuracy contract (explicit comment at 1395). Any new zoom/pan factor must be visible to all three in the same frame.

cam (+ zoom, vpW, vpH) is the ONLY projection input. camFollow/camPan/camLead/inspectZoomT/userZoom are pre-clamp ingredients consumed inside updateCamera; nothing render-side may read them. Extend the camera by adding ingredients, not by adding new projection inputs.

zoom is recomputed from zoomBase every updateCamera call (1376). Persistent user zoom must be a multiplicative factor in that expression; direct writes to `zoom` outside updateCamera are stomped within one frame.

cam is re-clamped to world bounds every frame with halfW/halfH derived from the CURRENT zoom (1391-1394), including the center-when-world-fits fallback — a zoom-out feature inherits correct edge behavior for free, but the clamp must run AFTER the final zoom for the frame is known.

updateCamera runs on realDt, after the fixed-step sim, unaffected by hitstop/FX.slowScale (frame 2593/2601). All camera eases use the frame-rate-independent form 1-exp(-k*dt) (or *= min(1,dt*k)); new transitions must too. MAX_FRAME_DT=0.05 bounds dt.

window.__aac (2641-2669) must keep exposing mode, cam, camFollow, camPan, zoom, inspect:{active,zoomT}, hud, perf — the jsdom smoke harness (see project memory: no browser in sandbox) asserts against these. Add new camera state (userZoom, camLock) additively; never rename/remove fields. Keep the classic <script> + window.__aac hook.

DAILY-mode determinism: camera code must never consume the seeded rng() stream (seedAmbient ordering comment at 2117). shake uses Math.random() — keep any new camera jitter on Math.random(), not rng().
roundHits screen-space hit-testing happens BEFORE pan-role assignment in onPointerDown (945 vs 955). New gestures (pinch, wheel-over-HUD) must not steal taps from HUD buttons; keep the ordering.

Camo math is untouched by camera state EXCEPT: ctrlMode gates (movement nudge 1009, practice slow-mo 2239, paint rooting 794). A camera-lock/zoom feature must not introduce new ctrlMode values without auditing every ctrlMode==='...' comparison (approx 30 sites).

Terrain blit source rect must stay clamped inside terrainCanvas ([0..worldW/H], 1417-1418) with the sw>0&&sh>0 guard, and source==dest coordinates under the world transform (no independent rounding of dest).
FX gates: punchZoom no-ops at FX_MOTION<=0; shake scales by shakeScale/settings.screenShake; haptics via vibe(). New camera juice must respect the same motion/photosensitive settings gates.

HUNT mode has no camera pan (pointer role 'ui' at 956-957) and no INSPECT/PAINT (guards in enterPaint/enterInspect 1048/1052); camFollow tracks the flown UFO via the same updateCamera. Extensions must preserve or consciously extend this per-mode gating.
gotchas: drawRound(alpha) declares an interpolation alpha that is never passed (called drawRound() at 2605) — there is NO render interpolation between fixed sim steps; don't assume it exists when adding smooth camera work (updateCamera already runs at render rate, which is why motion looks smooth).
Three writers touch `zoom`: initializer (558), computeZoom (1372), updateCamera (1376). A naive wheel handler writing `zoom` directly will appear to work for one frame then snap back.

Pan grab divides by the CURRENT zoom at each pointermove (971) — during an animated zoom (inspect ease, zoom punch) an in-flight drag changes its grab ratio and the world point under the finger drifts. For pinch/wheel zoom you must re-anchor: capture screenToWorld(cursor) before the zoom change and solve the pan/center offset so that point stays under the cursor after.

There is currently NO wheel listener and NO desktop pan input at all (only touch role 'pan'); `touch-action:none` on the canvas (line 13) means browser pinch/scroll never fires — pinch must be hand-rolled from two entries in `pointers`. Watch onPointerDown's handedness split: a second finger on the joystick side OVERWRITES the existing joystick object (952) rather than becoming a second gesture pointer — pinch detection must intercept before the joy-side branch.

clampPan max is mode-dependent and applied in BOTH pointermove (972) and updateCamera (1389): leaving INSPECT mid-drag hard-clamps 384->224 in one frame (visible jerk). A free-camera state should ease the clamp or re-clamp radially over time.

applyQuality can call resize() mid-round (420) on slow devices, resetting zoomBase (and rebuilding the sky). Store user zoom OUTSIDE zoomBase and re-derive zoom, or a perf dip silently resets the player's zoom.

camPan/ctrlMode are force-reset in at least 7 places (blur 891, enterPaint 1050, enterInspect 1053, recenter 1791, abduction 2053, win 2058, pause 2060, startRound 2119, spotted-kickout 1292). A camera-lock or persistent free-cam flag added only to updateCamera will leak or be silently dropped at these sites — sweep all of them.
startRound snaps cam BEFORE any clamping (2093); the first updateCamera clamps it, so an edge spawn shifts slightly on frame 1 — a scripted intro transition should clamp its own start pose.

drawThreatArrows inlines the worldToScreen formula (1878) instead of calling it — projection changes must update this duplicate (and drawInspectOverlay's SCAN_R*zoom ring radius at 1836, which assumes uniform scale).

Overlays drawn with worldToScreen (inspect rings, YOU marker, threat arrows) intentionally DO NOT shake (shake lives only in applyWorldTransform). Keep new overlays consistent, and note a zoomed-out 'whole map' view may make SCAN_R*zoom rings tiny — clamp minimum on-screen radii.

The zoom floor at 1376 is ZOOM_MIN*0.8=0.92, chosen so INSPECT's 0.78x of the smallest zoomBase (1.15) isn't crushed; a free zoom-out below that must raise/remove this floor AND rely on the world-fits centering branch (1393) — which centers per-axis independently (letterboxed maps center one axis while the other still clamps).
Practice slow-mo ties sim speed to ctrlMode==='INSPECT' (2239) — if you repurpose INSPECT zoom for a generic free-cam, practice rounds will slow down unexpectedly.
vpW/vpH are CSS px; dpr only appears inside setTransform and canvas sizing. Keep any new camera math in CSS-px screen space / world px — mixing in dpr will break on the 1.25/1.5 perf tiers.

skyCache is viewport-sized and static in screen space — at extreme zoom-out the parallax-free sky is fine, but the multiply color-grade (1471) and vignette are also full-viewport, so no changes needed there; only visRect consumers scale with zoom.
extensionPoints: FREE ZOOM (wheel/pinch) — state: add `let userZoom=1` near inspectZoomT (761) plus consts (e.g. USER_ZOOM_MIN=0.45, USER_ZOOM_MAX=1.6) near line 42. Fold into updateCamera line 1376: zoom = Math.max(floor, zoomBase * userZoomEased * (1+FX.zoomPunch) * (1+(INSPECT_ZOOM_MUL-1)*inspectZoomT)) where userZoomEased chases the target via the existing 1-exp(-k*dt) pattern. Do NOT modify computeZoom or write `zoom` anywhere else. Reset userZoom=1 at startRound line 2119 and expose it in __aac (2665).

WHEEL HANDLER — register next to the pointer listeners (~896-900): cv.addEventListener('wheel', e=>{e.preventDefault(); ...}, {passive:false}). Set userZoomTarget *= exp(-e.deltaY*k). Cursor-anchored zoom: const before=screenToWorld(e.clientX,e.clientY); apply the zoom for this frame (or defer to updateCamera), then const after=screenToWorld(...); camPan.x += before.x-after.x; camPan.y += before.y-after.y (adjusting camPan keeps cam the single projection input and preserves tap accuracy). Gate on appState==='ROUND' && roundState==='PLAYING' && round.mode!=='HUNT' to match touch pan.

PINCH — in onPointerDown (922): after the roundHits loop, if a non-joystick pointer arrives while another 'pan' pointer exists, promote both to role:'pinch' storing the start distance, start userZoom, start camPan, and start centroid world point (screenToWorld). On onPointerUp (978), demote the survivor back to role:'pan' with fresh sx0/px0 so it doesn't jump. Watch the joy-side overwrite at 952: check `joystick` existence before claiming the side.

CAMERA LOCK — add `let camLock=null; // null | {x,y,zoom?} | {target:()=>({x,y})}` near 761. Hook in updateCamera step (2): if(camLock){ tx=..., ty=... from lock; skip lookahead (force lead gate 0) } replacing the player target at line 1381; optionally force camPan spring-home. Per project memory the jsdom harness drives pointer events on cv and asserts __aac.cam/zoom — write new smoke cases for: wheel at a known cursor keeps screenToWorld(cursor) fixed (byte-exact within epsilon), pinch centroid invariance, lock release easing, and recenter resetting both pan and zoom.

stateObjects.name: ctrlMode
stateObjects.fields: 'MOVE' | 'PAINT' | 'INSPECT' (a plain let, no setter function exists)
stateObjects.role: THE control-mode machine. Explicitly distinct from round.mode (SURVIVE/HUNT/TA/...). Mutated directly in ~10 places: enterPaint/exitPaint/enterInspect/exitInspect (1048-1056), heal at gatherInput:774, blur:891, spotted eject:1292, endTimeAttack:2053, timeout:2058, togglePause:2060, startRound:2119.

stateObjects.name: keys

stateObjects.name: pointers

functions.name: gatherInput
functions.role: Merges keyboard(WASD/arrows) + joystick + gamepad into input{}. functions.role: Analog curve: <IDLE_MAG→0, <SNEAK_MAG→PLAYER_CREEP(55), else smoothstep to PLAYER_WALK(150).

functions.name: clampPan
functions.role: Radially clamps camPan; called with mode-dependent max from BOTH onPointerMove (972) and updateCamera (1389).

functions.name: screenToWorld / worldToScreen / inRect / isCoarse
functions.role: Projections read only cam & zoom (shake excluded on purpose). All hit-testing uses inRect in CSS px.

functions.name: pollGamepad

functions.name: updateGamepadEdges
functions.role: Once per rAF (frame:2591). In-round: Y(3)/X(2) togglePaintMode, RB(5) toggleInspect, LB(4)/LT(6) instantMatch, B(1) backs out of PAINT/INSPECT (834), Start(9) pause; HUNT: A/Y huntPulse. Menus: A confirm, B back, dpad nav.

functions.name: keydown listener

In-round bindings: E/P/Tab togglePaintMode (866), I toggleInspect (867), Q instantMatch (868), [ ] / R cyclePose (869), Ctrl dash, C decoy, V ink (871-873), Escape = exitPaint > exitInspect > togglePause (874), H debug (practice), M mute, else studioKey when studio.open (877). PAUSED and HUNT have earlier dedicated branches (853, 860). Non-round: menu nav (879-886).

functions.name: blur listener
functions.role: Panic reset: keys.clear, joystick=null, pointers.clear, ctrlMode='MOVE', camPan zeroed, auto-pause. ANY new lock/zoom state must be reset here.

functions.name: onPointerDown
functions.role: Master tap router (see flows). Registers pointer roles; splits joy-side vs pan-side at vpW*0.5 by settings.handed (948-958). setPointerCapture per pointer (925).

functions.name: onPointerMove
functions.role: Role dispatch: joystick math with JOY_DEAD/JOY_R (964-969); 'pan' sets camPan ABSOLUTELY = px0+(sx-sx0)/zoom then clampPan(mode max) (970-972); sv/hue/reticle/sscroll to studio/settings. Updates p.sx/p.sy for every pointer first (962).

functions.name: onPointerUp
functions.role: Deletes pointer, releases capture; nulls joystick only if the id matches (982) — a replaced stick is not killed by the old finger lifting. Also bound to pointercancel (899).

functions.name: movePlayer
functions.role: Integrates input: in INSPECT the speed base is input.moveMag*INSPECT_NUDGE (slow nudge, 1009); dash overrides; ice momentum; axis-separated collision.

functions.name: enterPaint / exitPaint
functions.role: enterPaint guards (!round || roundState!=='PLAYING' || HUNT), sets ctrlMode='PAINT', zeroes velocity+input, joystick=null, freezeHeld=false, camPan=0, openStudio(). exitPaint closes studio then ctrlMode='MOVE'.

functions.name: enterInspect / exitInspect / togglePaintMode / toggleInspect
functions.role: enterInspect: same guards, closes studio if open (PAINT→INSPECT is direct, no MOVE hop), joystick=null, camPan=0, SFX.ui. exitInspect: ctrlMode='MOVE', SFX.back. Toggles at 1055/1056 are the only public entry points used by HUD/keys/gamepad.

functions.name: openStudio / closeStudio
functions.role: Panel open/close + hex field blur + SFX; state 'OPEN_IDLE'/'CLOSED'.

functions.name: studioRects / studioPointerDown / studioSV / studioHue / studioReticleDrag / studioKey
functions.role: Studio geometry (logical 360x330 scaled to viewport, bottom-centered) and its own pointer consumption: close ✕ calls exitPaint (1085); sv/hue/reticle claim pointer roles; returns false if the tap missed everything so onPointerDown can fall through.

functions.name: instantMatch / doMatch
functions.role: Q / LB / MATCH button paint-to-ground sampling; works in any ctrlMode without opening the studio.

functions.name: computeZoom
functions.role: zoomBase = clamp(min(vpW,vpH)/(TARGET_VISIBLE_TILES*TILE), ZOOM_MIN, ZOOM_MAX); zoom=zoomBase. Called only from resize (2616).

functions.name: updateCamera
functions.role: Per-rAF (realDt, 2601). (1) inspectZoomT ease + zoom = max(ZOOM_MIN*0.8, zoomBase*(1+FX.zoomPunch)*(1+(INSPECT_ZOOM_MUL-1)*inspectZoomT)) at 1376 — the ONE place to inject a user zoom factor. (2) velocity lookahead only in MOVE (1378). (3) camFollow eased toward player with CAM_DEADZONE/CAM_STIFFNESS (1383) — the place to freeze for a camera-lock. (4) pan policy: PAINT forces 0; MOVE springs home at PAN_HOME_RATE when no 'pan' pointer is live; INSPECT holds (1385-1388). (5) cam = clamp(camFollow+camPan) to world edges (1391-1394). (6) trauma shake + FX decays.

functions.name: applyWorldTransform / applyScreenTransform
functions.role: World: setTransform(zoom*dpr,...,(vpW/2 - cam.x*zoom + shake.x)*dpr,...). Screen: identity*dpr.

functions.name: uiBtn
functions.role: Draws a button AND pushes {x,y,w,h,fn} into roundHits — declare-and-hit-test-in-one, rebuilt each frame.

functions.name: drawRoundHUD
functions.role: Resets roundHits/_hud (1718/1766); MODE dock 🎨/👁/MATCH/🕺 as 64px uiBtns mirrored by handedness (1767-1777, ids pushed via pushMode); ⏸/🔊 (1778); MODE pill always-visible always-exits-to-MOVE (1781-1788); ⌖ recenter only when |camPan|>RECENTER_SHOW=40, on the move side (1790); ability column gated ctrlMode!=='MOVE' (1793-1807); inspect overlay when inspectZoomT>0.01 (1811); joystick visual (1813); drawStudio (1824).

functions.name: drawInspectOverlay
functions.role: Seeker's-eye rings + YOU marker, alpha-driven by inspectZoomT.

functions.name: handleMenuTap / menuNav / menuConfirm / menuBack
functions.role: Menu/paused-overlay tap + keyboard/gamepad nav over navList (2304); PAUSED reuses this path.

functions.name: stepSim
functions.role: Fixed-tick sim: HUNT branch → stepHunt; practice slow-mo dt*=STUDIO_SLOWMO while studio.open||INSPECT (2239); gatherInput+movePlayer (2241).

functions.name: frame
functions.role: rAF loop: updateGamepadEdges (2591) → fixed-step stepSim accumulator (max 5 steps, 2596) → updateCamera(realDt) (2601) → drawRound/drawRoundHUD or drawMenu.

functions.name: resize
functions.role: Rebuilds canvas size + dpr, calls computeZoom — wheel-zoom state must survive this (keep it as a separate multiplier, not written into zoomBase).

functions.name: startRound (mode reset tail)
functions.role: studio.open=false, reticleOn=false, ctrlMode='MOVE', camFollow=cam, camPan=0, inspectZoomT=0, joystick=null. The canonical fresh-round reset list.

functions.name: togglePause
functions.role: On pause: closes studio inline, ctrlMode='MOVE', camPan=0, roundState='PAUSED'. Same inline reset also in endTimeAttack (2053) and survive-timeout (2058).

functions.name: window.__aac state hook
functions.role: Headless-test hook. Control-relevant exports: mode:ctrlMode, cam, camFollow, camPan, zoom, inspect:{active,zoomT}, move:{speed,mag,tag}, hud:_hud, ability:{freeze,...,freezeCap}, studio rects (2655-2657).

flows: TOUCH MOVE: pointerdown on move-hand side (949, side = vpW*0.5 split by settings.handed) → joystick={id,cx,cy} spawned at clamped finger position (951-953), pointers[id].role='joystick' → each pointermove: dx,dy from center, deadzone JOY_DEAD=10, radius JOY_R=70, joystick.dx/dy/mag normalized (964-969) → next fixed tick stepSim→gatherInput merges joystick+keys+gamepad (781-784), normalizes, speedFromMag → input{mx,my,speed,moveMag,tag} → movePlayer integrates with terrain mult + collision → updateCamera adds velocity lookahead (MOVE only) and eases camFollow → applyWorldTransform renders → pointerup with matching id nulls joystick (982).

CAMERA PAN (peek/free-look): pointerdown on the non-move side, round.mode!=='HUNT' (954) → role='pan' storing sx0,sy0,px0,py0 (955) → pointermove sets camPan ABSOLUTELY: camPan = p0 + (finger delta)/zoom (971), clampPan(INSPECT? 384 : 224) (972) → updateCamera: in MOVE, if no live 'pan' pointer, camPan springs home exp(PAN_HOME_RATE=8) with 0.5-unit snap (1386-1388); in INSPECT it holds; in PAINT forced 0 (1385) → cam=clamp(camFollow+camPan) (1391-1394) → ⌖ recenter button appears while |camPan|>40 and zeroes camPan on tap (1790-1791).

PAINT ENTRY: tap 🎨 (uiBtn→roundHits, hit at 945) | KeyE/KeyP/Tab (866) | gamepad Y/X (831) → togglePaintMode (1055) → enterPaint (1048): guard round PLAYING & !HUNT → ctrlMode='PAINT'; player.vx/vy=0; input zeroed; joystick=null; freezeHeld=false; camPan=0 → openStudio (1044) → every subsequent gatherInput hard-roots (794: mx=my=moveMag=speed=0) → updateCamera pins camPan=0 (1385) and drops lookahead (1378) → drawStudio (1824); practice rounds run at STUDIO_SLOWMO=0.35 (2239).

PAINT EXIT (all paths funnel to exitPaint:1051 → closeStudio + ctrlMode='MOVE'): ✕ close rect (studioPointerDown 1085) | tap outside the panel when reticle off (940) | Escape (874) | gamepad B (834) | MODE pill tap (1788) | Tab/E/P toggle (866) | spotted while non-practice (1292, with 'Spotted — move!' toast) | pause/end-of-round inline resets (2053/2058/2060) | window blur (890). Safety net: gatherInput heals PAINT-without-studio back to MOVE (774).

INSPECT ENTRY/EXIT: tap 👁 | KeyI (867) | RB (832) → toggleInspect (1056) → enterInspect (1052): guards, closes studio if open (so PAINT→INSPECT never passes through MOVE), ctrlMode='INSPECT', joystick=null, camPan=0 → per-frame updateCamera eases inspectZoomT→1 at rate 6 (1375) → zoom shrinks toward 0.78x (1376) → drawInspectOverlay fades in via inspectZoomT (1811,1831) → movement becomes slow nudge: base=moveMag*INSPECT_NUDGE=45 (1009) → pan allowed up to 384 and HELD (no spring) → exit via 👁/KeyI/Escape/B/pill/spotted → exitInspect (1054) → ctrlMode='MOVE', inspectZoomT eases back to 0.

TAP ROUTING ORDER in onPointerDown (922): preventDefault+capture → SETTINGS: help dismiss → settings taps → scroll drag (926-928) → non-ROUND: handleMenuTap (929) → PAUSED: handleMenuTap (931) → studio.open: studioPointerDown consumes panel widgets (932) → else roundHits (HUD stays live while painting: pill/👁/MATCH/⏸/🔊, 936) → outside-panel tap: reticle drag or exitPaint (938-941) → studio closed: roundHits FIRST (945) → CAUGHT/TIMEOUT swallow all (946) → joy-side spawns joystick / other side becomes 'pan' ('ui' in HUNT) (948-958).

ZOOM PIPELINE (no user zoom today): resize (2614) → computeZoom (1372): zoomBase=clamp(min(vpW,vpH)/(16*32),1.15,2.6) → every frame updateCamera:1376 overwrites zoom = max(ZOOM_MIN*0.8, zoomBase*(1+FX.zoomPunch)*(1+(INSPECT_ZOOM_MUL-1)*inspectZoomT)) → applyWorldTransform + screenToWorld/worldToScreen consume it. There are NO wheel/pinch/gesture/dblclick listeners anywhere (verified by grep); the only listeners are keydown/keyup/blur (847-892), pointer down/move/up/cancel + contextmenu on canvas (896-900), dragover/drop for map JSON (903), hexInput input/keydown/blur (1128-1130), resize (2633), visibilitychange (2634).

FREEZE STANCE (existing position-lock precedent): Space held (keyboard) or ❄ ability tap toggling freezeHeld (1806, gated ctrlMode==='MOVE') → gatherInput: freezeHeld auto-releases when stick pushed >0.2 (788); player.freeze = hider-mode && (Space||freezeHeld) && !dashing (790) → input zeroed (793) → computeCamo grows freezeCap toward FREEZE_CAP_MAX=0.985 (2038) rewarding the stance → HUD shows ❄ active (1798) → cleared on enterPaint (1050) and blur; player.freeze visible at __aac.ability.
GAMEPAD: axes polled inside gatherInput per sim tick (783 → pollGamepad 813); button EDGES handled once per rAF in updateGamepadEdges (2591 → 822) so mode toggles fire exactly once per press.

PAUSED/ENDED INPUT: stepSim early-returns unless PLAYING/COUNTDOWN (2237,2230) so gatherInput stops running; PAUSED taps route to handleMenuTap (931); CAUGHT/TIMEOUT taps swallowed as 'ui' (946) — mode transitions while not PLAYING are blocked by the guards in enterPaint/enterInspect.
invariants: window.__aac must keep exposing (and should gain, not lose, fields): mode:ctrlMode, cam, camFollow, camPan, zoom, inspect:{active,zoomT}, move:{speed,mag,tag}, hud:_hud (2663-2669). The jsdom smoke harness (per project memory) drives the game headlessly through this hook and classic <script> — do not modularize.

ctrlMode==='PAINT' ⇔ studio.open. gatherInput heals the desync toward MOVE (774) — 'never leave the hider rooted'. Any new rooted stance needs an equivalent liveness guarantee (a visible, always-tappable exit like the MODE pill 1788 + the heal).

cam is DERIVED every frame: cam = worldclamp(camFollow + camPan) (1391-1394); screenToWorld/worldToScreen read only cam & zoom; trauma shake is applied only in applyWorldTransform (1404) so projections stay exact — a camera-lock must manipulate camFollow/camPan, never write cam directly.

zoom is overwritten EVERY frame at updateCamera:1376 from zoomBase × punch × inspect. A user zoom must be a new persistent multiplier composed there (and clamped), never a direct write to zoom, or it will be erased next frame and reset by resize→computeZoom.

gatherInput runs at fixed 1/60 inside stepSim (deterministic sim); updateCamera runs per-rAF with realDt (smooth camera). Keep input sampling in the former and camera/zoom easing in the latter. Input code must never consume rng() (DAILY seeded determinism).

Every mode-teardown site resets the same trio {studio closed, ctrlMode='MOVE', camPan=0}: blur 890-892, spotted 1292, endTimeAttack 2053, timeout 2058, togglePause 2060, startRound 2118-2119. New lock/zoom state MUST be added to every one of these (or they must all be routed through one new setCtrlMode/reset helper).

roundHits and _hud are rebuilt from scratch every drawRoundHUD frame (1718/1766); hit rects are CSS px and scale with hudScale; dock mirrors via settings.handed. HUD buttons are hit-tested BEFORE world touch-zone routing (936/945) — that ordering is what keeps dock taps from spawning joysticks.
enterPaint/enterInspect guards: !round || roundState!=='PLAYING' || round.mode==='HUNT' → refuse. HUNT mode has no PAINT/INSPECT and no pan side (954/957).
Escape and gamepad-B priority is PAINT-exit > INSPECT-exit > pause (874/834).
clampPan max is mode-dependent (INSPECT_PAN_MAX vs MOVE_PEEK_MAX) and enforced in BOTH onPointerMove:972 and updateCamera:1389 — changing pan rules means patching both call sites.
The MODE pill (1781-1788) is always visible and always a get-me-back-to-Move target; HUD stays live while the studio is open (936). Preserve both when adding modes/stances.

Key auto-repeat is suppressed via keys.has (851) and hexInput focus swallows all game keys (850); window blur must clear any new held/toggled input state (890) so the player never walks (or stays locked) unattended.
gotchas: No wheel handler exists at all — and the CSS already sets touch-action:none + overscroll-behavior:none on html/body/canvas (lines 12-13), so browser pinch/scroll won't interfere, but you must still preventDefault() in a {passive:false} wheel listener to stop Ctrl+wheel browser zoom.

Two fingers on the pan side today = TWO independent 'pan' pointers, each writing camPan absolutely from its own anchor — last-moved wins (jitter). A pinch implementation must detect the second pan-side pointer at onPointerDown and convert BOTH to a 'pinch' pair instead of letting them fight.

Second finger on the joystick side REPLACES the joystick object (952): the old pointer keeps role 'joystick' but is ignored (id checks at 964/982). Comment at 982: 'don't kill a joystick a second finger still owns'. Pinch on the move side would need the same claim logic.

'pan' drags divide by the LIVE zoom (971) to stay 1:1 with the world grab — if zoom changes mid-drag (pinch/wheel while panning), the anchor math (sx0/px0) becomes stale and the view jumps; re-anchor (reset sx0/sy0/px0/py0 to current) whenever zoom changes with a pan pointer down.

zoomPunch is a FX multiplier tween (punchZoom 1310) on the same line as inspect zoom (1376) — clamp your user-zoom product against ZOOM_MIN*0.8 floor like the existing code, or punches can pop below the floor.

enterInspect closes the studio directly (1053) — PAINT→INSPECT skips exitPaint, so any exit-side effects you add to exitPaint won't run on that transition. A centralized setCtrlMode fixes this class of bug.

togglePause (2060), endTimeAttack (2053) and the survive-timeout (2058) close the studio INLINE (studio.open=false; studio.state='CLOSED') without calling closeStudio() — hexInput blur/SFX skipped intentionally; new teardown logic added only to closeStudio will be missed on those paths.

In gatherInput the freeze zeroing (793) runs BEFORE the PAINT zeroing (794); freezeHeld is auto-released by stick motion (788) BEFORE the freeze check — a stance-lock inserted in the wrong order will either be overridden by movement or break the auto-release UX.
stepSim applies practice slow-mo by scaling dt when studio.open||INSPECT (2239) — timers/cooldowns tick slower there; a stance-lock that should be real-time must not rely on stepSim dt in practice.

gatherInput only runs while roundState is PLAYING/COUNTDOWN (stepSim guards) — a toggle flipped via HUD tap while PAUSED would not take effect until resume; PAUSED taps can't reach roundHits anyway (931).

A tap on the HUD side that misses every button still falls through to joystick/pan creation (948-958) — new always-on-screen toggles must be registered in roundHits (drawn every frame) to be protected by the hit-test-first ordering.

cyclePose is bound to BOTH BracketRight and KeyR (870), and studioKey also consumes brackets when the studio is open (1118) — check collisions before binding new keys (free and safe-ish: KeyL, KeyO, KeyZ/X minus, KeyG; avoid Space/Ctrl/C/V/Q/E/P/I/H/M/R/Tab/brackets/comma/period/minus/equal/digits).

Gamepad indices in use: 0 A, 1 B, 2 X, 3 Y, 4 LB, 5 RB, 6 LT, 7 RT(creep), 9 Start, 12-15 dpad (822-843) — free: stick clicks 10/11, and axes[2/3] (right stick) are completely unused: ideal for camera pan/zoom.

cam.x/cam.y clamping collapses to world-center when the world is smaller than the viewport (1393-1394 ternary) — wheel-zoom OUT can trigger this branch on small maps and hard-center the camera; account for it when choosing a min user zoom.
menuHits (753) is dead code — menus actually use navList (2304); don't extend the wrong array.
extensionPoints: POSITION-LOCK STANCE — clone the freeze pattern: add `let stanceLock=false` next to freezeHeld (798); in gatherInput insert `if(stanceLock){ mx=0; my=0; moveMag=0; speed=0; tag='idle'; }` between lines 793 and 794 (after freeze, before PAINT) plus an optional stick-push auto-release mirroring 788; toggle via a new keydown case in the in-round block (~866-876) and either a 5th ABILITIES row (115 + tap handler 1806, gated ctrlMode==='MOVE') or a dock uiBtn in drawRoundHUD (~1776, push id via pushMode for _hud.modeButtons); reset it in: blur (891), enterPaint (1050), startRound (2119), togglePause (2060), endTimeAttack (2053), timeout (2058), spotted (1292); export in __aac.ability (2649) or __aac.move (2667). If it should also boost camo like freeze, feed it into the player.freeze expression at 790 instead of a separate zeroing.

CAMERA-LOCK TOGGLE — all in updateCamera (1373): add `let camLock=false` near camFollow (760) storing optionally {x,y} of the pinned point; when locked: force lead=0 (change the ternary at 1378 to include !camLock), skip the camFollow ease (guard line 1383), and decide pan policy (either keep 'pan' pointers working for manual framing or zero like PAINT at 1385). cam derivation (1391) needs no change. Toggle UI: a ⌖-style uiBtn near the recenter slot (1790) + a keydown case; interplay: when camLock engages, snapshot camFollow; when it disengages, the existing ease reconverges smoothly (no snap needed). Reset at the same six teardown sites as above; export `camLock` in __aac (2664 cam block). Test via harness: lock, walk player, assert cam stays while playerPos moves.

WHEEL ZOOM — add `let zoomUser=1;` beside zoomBase (1299) with e.g. const ZOOM_USER_MIN=0.6, ZOOM_USER_MAX=1.8 in §1 (~line 42); register `cv.addEventListener('wheel', onWheel, {passive:false})` with the pointer listeners (896-900); onWheel: e.preventDefault(); if(appState!=='ROUND'||roundState==='PAUSED') return; zoomUser=clamp(zoomUser*Math.exp(-e.deltaY*0.0015), MIN, MAX). Compose it at updateCamera:1376: `zoom=Math.max(ZOOM_MIN*0.8, zoomBase*(1+FX.zoomPunch)*(1+(INSPECT_ZOOM_MUL-1)*inspectZoomT)*zoomUser)`. Do NOT touch computeZoom (2616 resize keeps zoomBase semantics; zoomUser survives resize automatically). Optionally zoom-to-cursor by adjusting camPan with the pre/post screenToWorld delta of (e.clientX,e.clientY) — reuse clampPan. Reset zoomUser=1 at startRound (2119) and blur (891); __aac.zoom (2665) already reflects the final product.

PINCH ZOOM — build on the pointers Map (positions always fresh at 962): in onPointerDown, before the joy/pan split (~947), check `if([...pointers.values()].some(p=>p.role==='pan'))` and if so register the new pointer as role 'pinch' and convert the existing pan pointer too, storing d0=distance between the two, zoomUser0=zoomUser, and mid0; in onPointerMove add a 'pinch' branch computing dist/d0 → zoomUser=clamp(zoomUser0*ratio,...) (and optionally pan from midpoint drift / zoom); in onPointerUp, when one pinch finger lifts, demote the survivor back to 'pan' RE-ANCHORED (sx0=sx, sy0=sy, px0=camPan.x, py0=camPan.y) to avoid the stale-anchor jump. updateCamera's MOVE spring check (1386) must count 'pinch' as pan-active: change `pp.role==='pan'` to `pp.role==='pan'||pp.role==='pinch'`.

SEAMLESS MODE TRANSITIONS — introduce `function setCtrlMode(next)` beside the toggles (~1047) that owns: joystick=null, freezeHeld/stanceLock policy, camPan behavior (zero vs preserve — preserving camPan on MOVE↔INSPECT would already make that transition seamless since the spring/hold logic in 1385-1389 is per-mode), studio open/close, SFX, and per-mode ease targets. Replace the direct ctrlMode= assignments in enterPaint (1049), exitPaint (1051), enterInspect (1053), exitInspect (1054), the heal (774), blur (891), spotted (1292), teardown sites (2053/2058/2060) and startRound (2119). The rendering side is already transition-friendly: inspectZoomT eases both directions (1375), pan springs home (1387), camFollow eases (1383) — new modes only need an ease scalar like inspectZoomT plus a drawRoundHUD pill label/color entry (1781-1782) and dock button (1770-1777).

RIGHT-STICK CAMERA (free bonus seam): pollGamepad (813) reads only axes[0/1]; add axes[2/3] to its return and apply them to camPan (rate-based) in gatherInput or updateCamera — no existing binding conflicts.

NEW MODE-DOCK ENTRY: add uiBtn + pushMode in drawRoundHUD between lines 1770-1777 (BS-sized, ax advance respects `right`), extend the pill label/color ternaries (1781-1782), extend Escape/B priority chains (874/834), and add the enter/exit pair with the standard guards — that is the complete checklist the PAINT/INSPECT pair follows.

concern: PAINT STUDIO in /workspaces/abduct_a_chameleon/index.html (single ~2674-line file, one classic <script>): studio state, open/close lifecycle, panel geometry, HSV picker + SV cursor + loupe, presets, MATCH, paintCoach/activeAimMatch, 2-tone split camo, paint crawl (shifting), wet-paint FX — and exactly how the studio takes over the screen vs shows the world. KEY ANSWER: the studio never replaces the world render. drawRound() runs every frame regardless (frame() line 2605); drawStudio() is merely the last HUD layer (called from drawRoundHUD line 1824 when studio.open) and 'takes over' via two things only: (a) a full-viewport dim scrim fillRect rgba(6,10,20,0.72) at line 1924 drawn over the already-rendered world, and (b) a bottom-anchored 360x330 panel. The camera is meanwhile hard-locked on the player because updateCamera() line 1385 forces camPan=0 while ctrlMode==='PAINT' and line 1378 disables velocity lookahead outside MOVE; the player is rooted by gatherInput() line 794. So 'freeing the camera while painting' is three independent levers: the scrim (1924), the camPan force-zero (1385), and the movement root (794) — plus the pointer routing in onPointerDown (932-943) that treats any tap outside the panel as exit/reticle instead of joystick/pan.

stateObjects.name: studio
stateObjects.role: THE studio state singleton — open/close + reticle + which tone the picker edits
stateObjects.fields: { open:false, state:'CLOSED'|'OPEN_IDLE' (write-only, vestigial), reticleOn:false, coachHidden:false (latch for one-shot SFX.confirm when coach hits matched), activeTone:0|1, reticle:{x,y,active,hideAt} (world coords, hideAt=nowMs()+3000 refresh on drag) }

stateObjects.name: player (paint fields)
stateObjects.role: paint + camo state the studio edits; sim reads currentPaint*, studio writes targetPaint*
stateObjects.fields: currentPaint/targetPaint {r,g,b} (crawled vs aimed), paintHSV {h,s,v} (picker model for tone 0), shifting:bool (crawl in progress → +SHIFT_SHIMMER conspicuity, drives drip FX), splitPaint:bool, currentPaint2/targetPaint2/paintHSV2/mq2 (P8-3 tone 1), repaintT (0.4s shimmer ring after MATCH/preset), S/mq/m/conceal/C/ref (sim outputs; ref=terrainReference footprint incl. ref.tones[] sorted heaviest-first), prevConceal/snapT/snapCount/snapArmed (P8-5 blend-snap)

stateObjects.name: ctrlMode + camPan + camFollow + inspectZoomT

stateObjects.fields: ctrlMode (758), camPan {x,y} world units (759), camFollow {x,y} eased anchor (760), inspectZoomT 0..1 (761); cam/zoom/shake globals at 558

stateObjects.name: pointers / joystick / hexInput

stateObjects.name: studio-relevant constants
stateObjects.role: tuning
stateObjects.fields: PAINT_SHIFT_SPEED=300, SHIFT_DELTA_EPS=4 (45); SHIFT_SHIMMER=0.06 (53); STUDIO_SLOWMO=0.35 (64); SPLIT_MIN_W=0.18 (60); PRESET_ORDER 16 terrains (129); TERRAIN_RGB filled at boot (131/2626)

functions.name: openStudio / closeStudio
functions.role: open sets open=true,state='OPEN_IDLE',SFX.ui,syncHexField; close resets open/state/reticle.active/coachHidden, blurs hexInput, SFX.back. Neither touches ctrlMode.

functions.name: enterPaint / exitPaint / togglePaintMode
functions.role: mode transitions. enterPaint gates on round && roundState==='PLAYING' && mode!=='HUNT'; sets ctrlMode='PAINT', zeroes vx/vy/input/joystick/freezeHeld/camPan, then openStudio. exitPaint = closeStudio + ctrlMode='MOVE' — the ONLY safe close.

functions.name: studioRects
functions.signature: studioRects() → {scale, panel, sv, hue, match, swatch, matchPct, reticle, coach, split, hex, rgb, presets, title, close}
functions.role: single source of ALL panel geometry, in screen CSS px. Logical 360x330; scale=Math.min(1,vpW/400)*(vpH<520?0.86:1); panel centered horizontally, bottom-anchored py=vpH-ph-16. Logical sub-rects: sv(14,44,200,200), hue(222,44,30,200), match(262,44,84,40), swatch(262,92,84,44), matchPct(262,144,84,24), reticle(262,178,84,26), coach(262,206,84,24), split(262,232,84,22), hex(14,258,116,26), rgb(140,258,110,26), presets(14,290,334,34) as 8x2 grid, close(326,10,24,24). Both draw AND hit-test share this — move/resize here and everything follows.

functions.name: studioPointerDown
functions.role: hit-test in order: close→exitPaint; sv→role 'sv'+studioSV; hue→role 'hue'; match→doMatch; split→toggleSplit; swatch halves (split only)→studio.activeTone=0|1; reticle→toggleReticle; hex→hexInput.focus(); presets 8x2→setActivePaintColor(TERRAIN_RGB[PRESET_ORDER[i]])+spawnRepaintPuff; anywhere else in panel consumed as 'ui'; returns false outside panel.

functions.name: studioSV / studioHue / studioKey
functions.role: picker writes. studioSV: touch lift oy=18*scale above fingertip; H.s=(sx-r.x)/r.w, H.v=1-((sy-oy)-r.y)/r.h → setPaintFromHSV+syncHexField. studioHue: H.h from y. studioKey: brackets=hue±5, Comma/Period=v∓0.04, Minus/Equal=s∓0.04, KeyM=doMatch, Digit1-8=preset — but see gotcha: brackets and KeyM are shadowed by the outer keydown chain.

functions.name: activeHSV / activeTarget / setPaintFromHSV / setPaintColor / setToneColor / setActivePaintColor
functions.signature: activeHSV()→HSV ref; activeTarget()→rgb ref; setPaintFromHSV(); setPaintColor(rgb); setToneColor(tone,rgb); setActivePaintColor(rgb)
functions.role: tone routing layer: everything resolves through (player.splitPaint && studio.activeTone===1) to pick paintHSV2/targetPaint2 vs paintHSV/targetPaint. Presets and hex input route through setActivePaintColor/setToneColor so they honor the active tone.

functions.name: toggleSplit
functions.role: 2-tone on: copies tone1 target+current into tone2, activeTone=1, toast; off: activeTone=0. syncHexField after.

functions.name: applyMatch / doMatch / instantMatch / samplePos
functions.role: MATCH. samplePos = reticle pos if reticleOn&&active else player pos. applyMatch: ref=terrainReference(sx,sy); if split && ref.tones[1].w>SPLIT_MIN_W → setToneColor(0/1, rounded tones[0/1].rgb); split on uniform ground → both tones = mean; else setPaintColor(round(ref.rgb)); then syncHexField, SFX.match(player.mq), spawnRepaintPuff, addTrauma(TRAUMA.repaint), punchZoom(0.03,90,260), vibe(12). instantMatch works WITHOUT opening the studio (Q key 868, gamepad LB 833, HUD MATCH button 1774).

functions.name: toggleReticle / studioReticleDrag / drawReticle
functions.role: remote sample point. Toggle seeds at player, active=true, hideAt=+3s. Drag: screenToWorld(sx,sy) clamped to 6*TILE radius around player (depends on cam being correct!). drawReticle (1624) draws amber crosshair in WORLD space from drawRound step 10 (line 1468) — i.e. under the studio scrim.

functions.name: syncHexField + hexInput listeners
functions.role: keeps off-screen DOM input mirroring activeTarget() hex unless focused; typing parses hex2rgb and routes to the active tone; Enter blurs; keydown at 850 returns early for the whole game while hexInput focused.

functions.name: drawStudio
functions.role: the entire studio render, screen-space, called last in drawRoundHUD when studio.open: (1) full-screen scrim rgba(6,10,20,0.72) line 1924 — THE world-hiding line; (2) panel+title+'· slow-mo' tag if practice+✕; (3) SV square from activeHSV: hue fill + white→transparent horizontal + transparent→black vertical gradients, cursor ring at (sv.x+s*w, sv.y+(1-v)*h) line 1940; (4) P8-2 loupe lines 1943-1948: only while a pointers entry has role 'sv' && ptype 'touch' && FX_MOTION>0 — 15px swatch circle at (clamp(cx,±22 inset), sv.y+26) showing Math.round(activeAimMatch().mq*100)+'%'; (5) hue strip gradient + selection bar; (6) MATCH via uiStudioBtn (draw-only, fn ignored); (7) swatch: single → YOU(currentPaint)|GROUND(ref.rgb), split → TONE1(currentPaint)|TONE2(currentPaint2) with amber ring on activeTone (1963); (8) NOW/AIM readout from paintCoach (1975-1981): NOW=crawled body mq colored by PAL tier, AIM=target effMatch; (9) reticle toggle btn; (10) coach pill 1985-1990 with one-shot SFX.confirm latch via studio.coachHidden (re-arms below mqNow 0.8); (11) 2-TONE toggle btn; (12) hex box showing activeTarget; (13) RGB readout of currentPaint (tone 1 only — see gotcha); (14) 16 preset chips 8x2.

functions.name: uiStudioBtn
functions.role: studio button chrome; fn parameter is DEAD — hits are handled in studioPointerDown, not registered in roundHits.

functions.name: paintCoach
functions.role: P8-1 Live Match Coach, PURE READ-ONLY (contract in comment 530). mqNow=player.mq (crawled), mqAim=effMatch(targetPaint, targetPaint2, splitPaint, player.ref).mq. Hint: converts activeTarget & activeAimMatch().refRgb to HSV, candidates |dv| lighter/darker, |ds| more vivid/muted, |dw| warmer/cooler where dw=(cos(Rh)-cos(Ah))*0.5*min(As,Rs); largest wins. Consumed by drawStudio, HUD nudge (1739, only when !studio.open), inspect overlay (1849), __aac.paint (2654).

functions.name: activeAimMatch
functions.role: match of the ACTIVE tone vs the ground it should cover: single mode → footprint mean ref.rgb; split mode → the footprint tone nearest (redmean) to activeTarget. Feeds the coach hint and the loupe %.

functions.name: effMatch
functions.role: THE shared body-match model (sim computeCamoFor AND coach — comment 244: 'so they can never disagree'). single=min(matchQualityRef(pA,ref), terrainMatchCap(dominantKey)); split path (pB && tones.length>1 && tones[1].w>SPLIT_MIN_W): weighted Σ w·max(match(pA,tone),match(pB,tone)), capped; returns max(single,two) so two colors never do worse than one.

functions.name: matchQualityRef
functions.role: per-tone weighted match of one color across footprint tones; on uniform ground reduces EXACTLY to matchQuality(paint, that terrain) — the seam tax exists only on real seams.

functions.name: matchQuality / terrainReference
functions.signature: matchQuality(paint,ref)→0..1 (redmean smoothstep D_PERFECT=12..D_EXPOSED=220, line 483); terrainReference(px,py)→{rgb, dominantKey, dominantW, tones[]} (line 215)
functions.role: terrainReference is footprint area-weighted mean over PLAYER_RADIUS box + per-key tone list (kw), also the MATCH eyedropper source.

functions.name: updatePaint / computeCamoFor / computeCamo
functions.role: how paint applies to the player: updatePaint crawls currentPaint (and currentPaint2 if split) toward targets at PAINT_SHIFT_SPEED=300/channel/s, sets player.shifting = maxRemaining>SHIFT_DELTA_EPS=4. computeCamoFor: ref=terrainReference(a.x,a.y)→a.ref; em=effMatch(a.currentPaint,a.currentPaint2,a.splitPaint,ref); stillness; conceal=concealment(...); C=conspicuity(conceal,m,a.shifting) — shifting adds SHIFT_SHIMMER=0.06 (line 507). computeCamo = updatePaint + computeCamoFor(player). Called from stepSim 2244 and countdown 2233. crawlPaint (2046) is the bot-hider clone.

functions.name: maybePaintDrip
functions.role: P8-4 wet-paint: while player.shifting, every 0.12s emit one 'drip' particle in CURRENT (crawling) color, vy=16..34 + gravity g:120, jittered within PLAYER_DRAW_R; dripEmitted++ (monotonic, test-visible). FX_MOTION<=0 → no-op. Integrated in updateParticles (1355), rendered in drawRound (1438).

functions.name: spawnRepaintPuff
functions.role: repaint FX on MATCH/preset: 12 puffs + white expanding ring in targetPaint color, sets player.repaintT=0.4 (drawChameleon shimmer ring at 1587), plus P8-4 spray fan: 6 droplets in NEW color kicked opposite player.facing (FX_MOTION gated).

functions.name: drawChameleon / drawHumanoid
functions.signature: drawChameleon(); drawHumanoid(x,y,f,css,conceal,o) with o.css2 for split (1524)
functions.role: body shows crawled currentPaint (+currentPaint2 as css2 → lower-half overpaint with seam line, 1552-1557); repaint shimmer ring while repaintT>0.

functions.name: gatherInput (heal + root)
functions.role: line 774: heals ctrlMode==='PAINT' && !studio.open → 'MOVE' (never leave hider rooted); line 794: if ctrlMode==='PAINT' zero mx/my/moveMag/speed → player rooted while painting.

functions.name: updateCamera (PAINT lock)
functions.role: line 1378 lead only in MOVE; line 1385 `if(ctrlMode==='PAINT'){ camPan.x=0; camPan.y=0; }`; line 1390-1394 cam = clamp(camFollow+camPan) — net effect in PAINT: camera eases dead-center onto the player and stays there. screenToWorld/worldToScreen (769/770) read cam+zoom only; shake is transform-offset only (1404) so projections stay exact.

functions.name: stepSim (slow-mo gate)
functions.role: line 2239: `const slow=(round.diff.practice && (studio.open || ctrlMode==='INSPECT'))?STUDIO_SLOWMO:1; dt*=slow;` — practice-only 0.35x while studio open. Then movePlayer, computeCamo, maybeFootstep, maybePaintDrip, updateBlendSnap, updateBots... World sim KEEPS RUNNING while the studio is open (bots hunt you mid-paint).

functions.name: onPointerDown / onPointerMove (studio routing)
functions.role: 932-943: if studio.open → studioPointerDown first; unconsumed → roundHits HUD (pill/👁/MATCH/⏸/🔊 stay live); outside panel → reticleOn? start 'reticle' drag : exitPaint. onPointerMove 963: 'sv'/'hue'/'reticle' roles ignored if !studio.open (closed mid-drag); 973-975 dispatch studioSV/studioHue/studioReticleDrag.

functions.name: drawRoundHUD (studio call site + paint buttons)
functions.role: 1770 🎨 button (active ring when PAINT), 1774 MATCH→instantMatch, 1780-1788 MODE pill (always-visible exit), 1739 coach nudge line under match meter suppressed while studio.open; 1824 `if(studio.open) drawStudio();` — studio is the LAST layer before countdown/pause banners.

functions.name: triggerAbduction / endRound (force close)
functions.role: 2053 and 2058 force `studio.open=false; studio.state='CLOSED'; ctrlMode='MOVE'; camPan=0` directly (bypassing closeStudio — no hexInput blur, no reticle reset) before TA respawn / win.

functions.name: keydown handler (ROUND branch)
functions.role: 866 KeyE/KeyP/Tab→togglePaintMode; 868 KeyQ→instantMatch; 874 Escape→exitPaint when PAINT; 877 `else if(studio.open) studioKey(e.code)` — LAST in the else-if chain, so earlier branches shadow studio keys (see gotchas).

functions.name: __aac test hook (studio slice)
functions.role: exposes studio:{open,svV,activeTone,t0,t1,svRect,splitRect,closeRect(only when open)}, paint:{mqNow,mqAim,word,hint} from paintCoach, split, mq2, tones, snapCount, dripEmitted, mode/cam/camFollow/camPan/zoom, hud:_hud. The jsdom smoke harness drives the studio through these rects.

flows: OPEN: tap 🎨 (drawRoundHUD 1770) OR KeyE/KeyP/Tab (866) OR gamepad Y/X (831) → togglePaintMode (1055) → enterPaint (1048): gate round&&PLAYING&&!HUNT → ctrlMode='PAINT'; player.vx=vy=0; input zeroed; joystick=null; freezeHeld=false; camPan=(0,0) → openStudio (1044): studio.open=true, state='OPEN_IDLE', SFX.ui, syncHexField. From the next frame: gatherInput 794 roots movement; updateCamera 1385 pins camPan=0 and 1378 kills lookahead → camFollow eases exactly onto player; stepSim 2239 multiplies dt by STUDIO_SLOWMO (0.35) in PRACTICE only; frame 2605 still runs drawRound (full world) → drawRoundHUD → 1824 drawStudio: 0.72-alpha scrim over the world + bottom panel.

CLOSE: ✕ hit (studioPointerDown 1085) / tap outside panel with reticle off (onPointerDown 940) / Escape (874) / gamepad B (834) / spotted mid-paint in non-practice (1292 'Spotted — move!') → exitPaint (1051) → closeStudio (1045: open=false, reticle.active=false, coachHidden=false, hexInput.blur, SFX.back) + ctrlMode='MOVE'. Force paths: triggerAbduction 2053 and endRound-win 2058 set studio.open=false + ctrlMode='MOVE' directly. Desync heal: gatherInput 774 fixes PAINT-without-open every frame.

PICK COLOR (SV drag, touch): pointerdown in r.sv (1086) → pointers.set(role:'sv', ptype) + studioSV(sx,sy,ptype) → oy=18*scale fingertip lift; activeHSV().s/.v updated → setPaintFromHSV (1028) writes player.targetPaint (or targetPaint2 if split&&activeTone===1) → syncHexField. pointermove (973) repeats while dragging. Render: drawStudio 1940 draws SV cursor ring at (sv.x+s*w, sv.y+(1-v)*h); 1944-1948 loupe appears (touch+FX_MOTION>0): floating 15px swatch of hsv2rgb(activeHSV()) + activeAimMatch().mq% label. Sim (each fixed step): computeCamo (2044) → updatePaint (2013) crawls currentPaint→targetPaint at 300/ch/s → player.shifting=true while Δ>4 → conspicuity +0.06 (507) + maybePaintDrip (1348) drips currentPaint-colored drops → drawChameleon (1583) shows the crawling color; drawStudio NOW% (crawled, from paintCoach.mqNow) lags AIM% (target, paintCoach.mqAim) until crawl completes.

MATCH: (a) studio MATCH rect → studioPointerDown 1088 → doMatch (1066) → samplePos (1057: reticle if on+active, else player) ; (b) instantMatch (1067) from KeyQ 868 / gamepad LB 833 / HUD MATCH 1774 — always player pos, works with studio closed. Both → applyMatch(sx,sy) (1060): ref=terrainReference(sample) → split && ref.tones[1].w>0.18 ? setToneColor(0,round(tones[0].rgb)) + setToneColor(1,round(tones[1].rgb)) : split ? both tones=round(ref.rgb) : setPaintColor(round(ref.rgb)) → syncHexField; SFX.match(player.mq); spawnRepaintPuff (puffs+ring+spray fan, repaintT=0.4); addTrauma(0.16); punchZoom; vibe → subsequent steps crawl as above; mq rises as currentPaint converges (per-tone: byte-identical on uniform ground).

RETICLE (paint-by-aim): reticle btn → toggleReticle (1108) seeds reticle at player, hideAt=+3s → drag: pointerdown OUTSIDE panel while reticleOn (939) or existing 'reticle' role → studioReticleDrag (1111): screenToWorld(sx,sy) clamped to ≤6*TILE from player → doMatch samples reticle position. Draw: drawRound step 10 (1468) → drawReticle (1624) world-space crosshair — currently dimmed by the drawStudio scrim painted later.

2-TONE: split rect → toggleSplit (1039): tone2 := tone1 copies, activeTone=1, toast → swatch left/right halves select activeTone (1090-1091, amber ring at 1963) → picker/hex/presets all route via activeHSV/activeTarget/setActivePaintColor → sim: computeCamoFor 2033 effMatch(currentPaint,currentPaint2,splitPaint,ref) — split engages only when tones[1].w>SPLIT_MIN_W, mq=max(single,two); body render: drawHumanoid css2 overpaints lower half + seam line (1552-1557). Coach follows the ACTIVE tone via activeAimMatch (524-527 picks nearest footprint tone by redmean).

COACH: every drawStudio frame → paintCoach (532) → NOW/AIM texts (1975-1981) + hint pill (1985-1988: '▲ lighter'/'◆ more vivid'/'☼ warmer' etc.) → on mqNow≥0.85 one-shot SFX.confirm latched by studio.coachHidden (1989), re-armed when mqNow<0.8 (1990). With studio CLOSED the same coach feeds the HUD nudge under the match meter (1739, only when mq<85 && player.ref && !studio.open) and the INSPECT overlay readout (1849).

FRAME ORDER (why world stays visible under the studio): frame (2588) → stepSim fixed steps (input/move/paint-crawl/camo/bots) → updateParticles/updateChameleonAnim/updateCamera (realDt — camera and FX never slow-mo) → drawRound (2605: sky→terrain→particles incl. drips/sprays→cover→player→ufos→reticle→grade/vignette) → drawRoundHUD (meters→buttons→pill→abilities→joystick→ 1824 drawStudio scrim+panel →countdown/pause) → drawStreaks → flash → drawToast.
invariants: effMatch (246) is THE single body-match model shared by sim (computeCamoFor 2033) and coach (paintCoach 534) — comment at 244 says 'so they can never disagree'. Any new paint feature must route match math through effMatch/matchQualityRef, never fork it.

Uniform-ground calibration: matchQualityRef (239) and effMatch must stay byte-identical to matchQuality(paint, terrain) when the footprint has one tone (comments 236-238, and project memory: single-color match is per-tone). Tests depend on this.
paintCoach is PURE READ-ONLY (contract comment 530-531): it must never write sim/paint state — it is called from render paths and the __aac getter.

window.__aac hook shape (2641-2669) is a test API: studio.{open,svV,activeTone,t0,t1,svRect,splitRect,closeRect}, paint.{mqNow,mqAim,word,hint}, split, mq2, tones, snapCount, dripEmitted, mode, cam/camFollow/camPan/zoom, hud. The jsdom smoke harness (project memory) drives the studio through these rects — keep the getter, the classic <script>, and rect exposure intact.

dripEmitted (1325) and snapCount (664) are MONOTONIC and motion-independent logic counters for tests (snap logic in updateBlendSnap runs even when its visual is FX_MOTION-gated; drips are FX-gated but the counter comment says monotonic — don't reset either mid-round).

Projection exactness: cam is the only projection source — cam = clamp(camFollow + camPan) (1390-1394); trauma shake is a transform offset only (1395, 1404) 'keeps screenToWorld exact'. studioReticleDrag and any in-world paint aiming depend on screenToWorld(769) being exact — never bake shake or punch into cam.
gatherInput heal (774): ctrlMode==='PAINT' && !studio.open must always resolve to 'MOVE' — 'never leave the hider rooted'. Preserve this if you decouple studio.open from ctrlMode.

There is always an exit while painting: HUD roundHits stay live during studio (936, comment: MODE pill, 👁, MATCH, ⏸, 🔊), Escape (874), gamepad B (834), ✕ (1085), tap-outside (940). Any redesign must keep at least the pill exit (1788).
STUDIO_SLOWMO applies ONLY in practice (2239) — competitive modes keep real-time sim while painting; camera/particles/animation always tick at realDt (2601).
studioRects is the single geometry source for BOTH drawing and hit-testing — never hardcode panel coordinates elsewhere; __aac exposes sv/split/close rects straight from it.

Fixed-step determinism: sim runs in DT_FIXED=1/60 steps (2596), per-round seeded rng=mulberry32; paint crawl and camo math live inside stepSim so they stay deterministic — don't move updatePaint into a realDt path.
gotchas: Keyboard shadowing kills three studioKey bindings: the ROUND keydown else-if chain (866-877) consumes BracketLeft/BracketRight → cyclePose (869-870) and KeyM → setMuted (876) BEFORE reaching `else if(studio.open) studioKey(e.code)` (877). So studioKey's hue-nudge brackets (1118) and KeyM→doMatch (1121) are unreachable; only Comma/Period (value), Minus/Equal (saturation), and Digit1-8 (presets) actually work while the studio is open.

Abilities fire while painting from the keyboard: Ctrl→dash, KeyC→decoy, KeyV→ink (871-873) have no ctrlMode gate (useAbility 799 checks only roundState), while the HUD ability buttons ARE gated on ctrlMode==='MOVE' (1806). A dash while rooted in PAINT teleports the 'rooted' painter.

One-way desync heal: gatherInput 774 fixes PAINT-without-studio, but nothing fixes studio.open===true with ctrlMode==='MOVE'. The window blur handler (890) sets ctrlMode='MOVE' and pauses but leaves studio.open=true — after alt-tab mid-paint and resume, the panel is drawn while the player can move, and pointerdowns still route through studioPointerDown (932).
studio.state ('CLOSED'/'OPEN_IDLE') is write-only — set in open/close/force paths, read nowhere. Don't build on it; studio.open is the real flag.

The scrim (drawStudio 1924) is drawn AFTER drawRound, so the world — including the world-space reticle drawn at 1468 — is dimmed to 28% behind the studio. If you remove the scrim to keep the world visible, note the reticle then shows at full brightness under the panel.

Force-close paths (triggerAbduction 2053, endRound 2058) bypass closeStudio: no hexInput.blur(), reticle.active stays as-is, coachHidden not reset. If hexInput was focused when abducted, it stays focused and eats keydowns (850) until something blurs it.

uiStudioBtn's fn argument is ignored (2008) — studio buttons are draw-only; real hits live in studioPointerDown. Adding a studio button requires touching BOTH drawStudio and studioPointerDown (and studioRects).

RGB readout (2001) always shows player.currentPaint (tone 1's crawled color) even when editing tone 2, and shows the CRAWLED color while hex (1998) shows the TARGET of the active tone — they legitimately disagree during a crawl and across tones.

The loupe only exists for touch (ptype==='touch') pointers with FX_MOTION>0 (1944-1945); mouse drags never see it. studioSV's 18px fingertip lift also applies only to touch — a mouse picks exactly under the cursor.
syncHexField skips writing while hexInput is focused (1127) and the global keydown returns early while it's focused (850) — remember to blur (closeStudio does) or the whole game keyboard goes dead.
Pointer roles survive studio closure: onPointerMove guards 'sv'/'hue'/'reticle' with `&& !studio.open` (963); replicate that guard for any new studio drag role or a close-mid-drag will keep painting.

MATCH's spray-fan and drip colors differ on purpose: spawnRepaintPuff sprays the NEW targetPaint (1327, 1332), maybePaintDrip drips the CURRENT crawling color (1349) — visually 'new paint over wet old paint'. Decoys copy only currentPaint, not tone 2 (804).

studioReticleDrag uses screenToWorld with the live cam (1111). Today cam is pinned to the player in PAINT; if you free the camera while painting, the 6*TILE clamp is still centered on the PLAYER (1112), so a far-panned camera can make the reticle un-reachable on screen.

In-panel taps that hit nothing are still consumed (1098) — the panel is opaque to world input; taps outside exit paint (940) unless reticleOn. Both behaviors must change for paint-while-world-interactive.
stepSim's slow-mo (2239) keys on studio.open OR ctrlMode==='INSPECT' — if painting no longer implies studio.open you may silently lose practice slow-mo.
hueGradCache (1921) is declared but never used — the hue gradient is rebuilt every frame (1950-1951); harmless, but don't assume caching exists.
studioLocal (1082) is defined but unused — all hit-testing is in screen space via studioRects; safe to repurpose or ignore.
extensionPoints: Show the world while painting: in drawStudio (1922), delete or conditionalize the scrim `ctx.fillStyle='rgba(6,10,20,0.72)'; ctx.fillRect(0,0,vpW,vpH)` at 1924 (e.g. keep a light 0.2 scrim only behind the panel, or draw a gradient only over the panel's bottom band). The world is already fully rendered underneath every frame — nothing else needs to change to reveal it.

Camera free/locked while painting: updateCamera (1373). To LOCK on player: current behavior already does this (1385 zeroes camPan; 1378 lead=0). To FREE the camera: change 1385 from the PAINT force-zero to the MOVE spring-home branch (1386-1388) or the INSPECT hold behavior, and optionally include 'PAINT' in the `lead` condition at 1378. Then enable pan-finger allocation while the studio is open (see next point). clampPan at 1389 picks the max radius per mode — add a PAINT radius constant next to MOVE_PEEK_MAX/INSPECT_PAN_MAX (41).

Pointer routing for world interaction during paint: onPointerDown (922), studio branch 932-943. Replace the 'outside panel → exitPaint' fallthrough (938-941) with the joystick/pan allocation logic from the non-studio path (947-958) (e.g. outside-panel = 'pan' role, or joystick on the move side). Keep the roundHits pass (936) first so the pill/HUD exits keep working, and keep reticle-drag priority (939) if reticleOn.

Move-while-painting: gatherInput (773) line 794 is the single root — condition it (e.g. allow sneak-speed only: `input.speed=Math.min(input.speed,PLAYER_CREEP)` instead of zeroing) and remove the velocity zeroing in enterPaint (1049) accordingly. The camo sim already handles movement penalties (conspicuity MOVE_BEACON) with no other changes.

Compact / dockable studio: studioRects (1070) is the only geometry authority. Shrink LW/LH, anchor to a side (change px/py math), or return a second layout (e.g. 'rail' mode) — drawStudio and studioPointerDown and __aac rect exposure all follow automatically. If you add/remove sub-rects, mirror them in the __aac studio slice (2657) for the jsdom harness.

Paint-at-camera-target (free-cam painting): applyMatch (1060) already accepts any world point; add a helper `matchAtScreenCenter()` = applyMatch(screenToWorld(vpW/2,vpH/2)) or extend samplePos (1057) with a third source (camera crosshair) — samplePos is the single sampling seam for doMatch. Fix the reticle clamp center in studioReticleDrag (1112) from player to cam if the camera is free.

New MATCH/paint entry points: instantMatch (1067) is the studio-independent apply path — bind new buttons through uiBtn in drawRoundHUD (pattern at 1774) which auto-registers roundHits; those stay live even while the studio is open (936).

In-world paint UI (rings, aim ghost, coverage preview): draw from drawRound step 10 next to the drawReticle call (1468) — world-space, culled by visRect, under the HUD. Use paintCoach()/activeAimMatch() for live numbers (read-only, safe in render).

New coach behaviors: paintCoach (532) is the single hint generator; extend the candidate list at 544-546. Keep it read-only and keep mqAim = effMatch(...targets...) so __aac.paint.mqAim stays consistent with the sim.

New tones (3+ split) or paint materials: extend the tone routing layer (activeHSV 1027, activeTarget 1038, setToneColor 1034, setActivePaintColor 1037), effMatch (246) for the match model, updatePaint (2013) for the crawl, drawHumanoid css2 block (1552) for rendering, and applyMatch's tone sampling (1061-1063). SPLIT_MIN_W (60) gates when extra tones matter.
