Wet-paint FX tuning/extension: maybePaintDrip (1348) for emission (rate 0.12s, gravity 120), spawnRepaintPuff (1332) for the spray fan, particle types in updateParticles (1353) + drawRound renderer (1436-1441). Keep dripEmitted monotonic. New paint-flow FX should be FX_MOTION-gated like these.

Progression hooks around painting: updateBlendBook (622) logs mastery when mq≥BLEND_LOG_MQ held BLEND_LOG_HOLD; logBlend/checkBiomeMedals (628/635) grant medals; updateBlendSnap (1360) is the crossing-detector for 'you just vanished' — new paint-skill achievements belong beside these, reading player.mq/conceal/S, never writing them.

Slow-mo policy for new paint flows: the single gate is stepSim 2239 — decide whether your in-world painting mode keys off studio.open, ctrlMode==='PAINT', or a new flag, and update that one expression.

If you decouple studio.open from ctrlMode==='PAINT' (e.g. panel closed but paint-aiming active): extend the heal at gatherInput 774 to cover the new state combination, keep exitPaint (1051) as the canonical teardown, and add the missing reverse heal (studio.open && ctrlMode!=='PAINT') there too — it fixes the existing blur-desync bug for free.

concern: APP/ROUND FLOW & HUD in /workspaces/abduct_a_chameleon/index.html (single classic <script>, ~2674 lines): appState screen machine, round.mode variants (PRACTICE/SURVIVE/HEAT/DAILY/HUNT/TA), round lifecycle, HUD (meters/threat arrows/mode dock/toasts/banners), tutorial, pause, transitions, drawInspectOverlay.

stateObjects.name: appState
stateObjects.role: Top-level screen machine
stateObjects.fields: string: 'BOOT' | 'TITLE' | 'MODE_SELECT' | 'LEVEL_SELECT' | 'DIFFICULTY_SELECT' | 'SUMMARY' | 'SETTINGS' | 'WARDROBE' | 'ROUND'. drawMenu() branches on it every frame; all input handlers gate on it first.

stateObjects.name: roundState
stateObjects.role: In-round sub-machine (only meaningful when appState==='ROUND')
stateObjects.fields: string: 'COUNTDOWN' | 'RESUME_COUNTDOWN' | 'PLAYING' | 'PAUSED' | 'CAUGHT' (abduct cutscene) | 'TIMEOUT' (win anim). Stale value persists in menus; every consumer checks appState==='ROUND' first.

stateObjects.name: round
stateObjects.role: Active round config+runtime, built in startRound()
stateObjects.fields: { entry, mode ('PRACTICE'|'SURVIVE'|'HEAT'|'DAILY'|'HUNT'|'TA'), diff (clone of DIFF.* or PRACTICE_DIFF or makeHeatDiff()), ufos[], timeLeft, countdown, lastCount, caught, caughtBy, finalized, spawnGrace, nearUfo, debug, spottedReason, reasonUntil, spottedFlash, summaryT, seed, summary, decoys[], inks[], beacons[], taBanked, heat, heatT, heatUfoT, metrics{survivalMs,blendAccum,lowDetectMs,streakBestMs,streakCur,spottedCount,nearMisses,timeMovingMs,timeStillMs,ghostMs}, _blendHold, biome; HUNT adds bots[], hunterCaught, pings[] }

stateObjects.name: ctrlMode
stateObjects.role: Control mode within a round — distinct from round.mode
stateObjects.fields: 'MOVE' | 'PAINT' | 'INSPECT'. Drives the MODE pill, ability gating, camera pan caps, inspect zoom. Must be reset to 'MOVE' on every exit from PLAYING (pause/win/caught/blur).

stateObjects.name: round.summary
stateObjects.role: Payload drawSummary() renders
stateObjects.fields: { outcome:'WIN'|'LOSE', score, grade('S'..'F'), survSec, avgBlendPct, streak, near, spotted, ghostSec, isBest, prevBest, t0 } plus hunt:true+{caught,total,timeUsed} (endHunt 2164) or ta:true+{banked,total,timeUsed} (endTimeAttack 2221)

stateObjects.name: navList / menuIndex
stateObjects.role: Immediate-mode menu widget list shared by ALL menus AND the pause overlay
stateObjects.fields: navList=[{x,y,w,h,fn}] rebuilt during every menu/pause draw via navBtn(); menuIndex = keyboard/gamepad cursor. handleMenuTap hit-tests it; menuConfirm fires navList[menuIndex].fn

stateObjects.name: roundHits
stateObjects.role: In-round on-screen button hitboxes
stateObjects.fields: [{x,y,w,h,fn}] reset to [] at top of drawRoundHUD (1718); uiBtn() pushes into it; onPointerDown hit-tests it before joystick/pan allocation

stateObjects.name: _hud
stateObjects.role: HUD geometry exported for tests via window.__aac.hud
stateObjects.fields: { modeButtons:[{id:'paint'|'inspect'|'match'|'pose',x,y,w,h}], pill:{x,y,w,h}|null, recenter:{x,y,w,h}|null } — refilled each drawRoundHUD

stateObjects.name: pendingMode / pendingLevel / showHelp
stateObjects.role: Menu-flow scratch state
stateObjects.fields: pendingMode ('SURVIVE' default) chosen at MODE_SELECT, consumed by selectLevel; pendingLevel held across DIFFICULTY_SELECT; showHelp overlays drawHelp() on any menu screen and swallows the next confirm/tap/back

stateObjects.name: settings
stateObjects.role: Persisted prefs (LS_SETTINGS='aac.settings.v1'), also nav-relevant
stateObjects.fields: { muted, lastMode, lastLevel, lastDiff, volMaster, volSfx, volMusic, motion, screenShake, photosensitive, colorblind, highContrast, textSize, haptics, handed('right'|'left' mirrors the HUD), tutorialSeen (first-play help trigger), perf, controlsSeen }

stateObjects.name: settingsReturn / settingsScroll / settingsHits / settingsMaxScroll
stateObjects.role: Settings screen state
stateObjects.fields: settingsReturn: 'TITLE'|'PAUSE' — where closeSettings() goes back to; settingsHits is the settings-only hitbox list (settings does NOT use navList); scroll clamped to settingsMaxScroll computed during draw

stateObjects.name: toast
stateObjects.role: Single-slot transient banner
stateObjects.fields: {text, until:nowMs()+2400}|null; showToast overwrites; drawToast renders bottom-center, drawn LAST in frame() so it floats above every screen

stateObjects.name: player (HUD-relevant fields)
stateObjects.role: Hider actor; HUD reads smoothed display values
stateObjects.fields: mqDisplay/detDisplay (eased meter values, 1724-1726), mq, conceal, C, S, ref, alive, abductT (CAUGHT cutscene clock), pose, freeze, cd{dash,decoy,ink}; HUNT repurposes pulseCd/pulseT/beamCharge/beamTarget

stateObjects.name: studio
stateObjects.role: Paint Studio panel state (child overlay of the HUD while ctrlMode==='PAINT')
stateObjects.fields: { open, state:'CLOSED'|'OPEN_IDLE', reticleOn, coachHidden, activeTone, reticle{active,x,y} } — must be force-closed by pause/win/caught/spotted transitions

stateObjects.name: LEVELS / BAKED_MAP
stateObjects.role: Level catalog for LEVEL_SELECT
stateObjects.fields: entry = { file, name, display, data, loaded, thumb, usedBaked?, _loading? }; loadLevels() fetches maps/levels.json then always appends the baked 'Prototype Meadow' card; drag-drop (904) pushes custom entries

stateObjects.name: DIFF / PRACTICE_DIFF / GRADE / timing consts
stateObjects.role: Mode tuning tables
stateObjects.fields: DIFF.EASY/NORMAL/HARD {UFO_COUNT,SCAN_R,...,SURVIVE_TIME,diffIndex,label}; PRACTICE_DIFF=EASY+{LOCK_TIME:∞,SURVIVE_TIME:∞,practice:true}; GRADE thresholds S..D (103); COUNTDOWN_SEC=3, RESUME_COUNTDOWN=0.8, ABDUCT_CUTSCENE=1.4, TIMEOUT_ANIM=1.2 (102); DT_FIXED=1/60, MAX_FRAME_DT=0.05 (33); TA_* (111); HUNT_TIME/HIDER_COUNT (114)

stateObjects.name: joystick / pointers / input / keys
stateObjects.role: Input state feeding both HUD drawing and sim
stateObjects.fields: joystick {id,cx,cy,dx,dy,mag} drawn by drawRoundHUD; pointers Map(id→{sx,sy,role:'ui'|'joystick'|'pan'|'sv'|'hue'|'reticle'|'sscroll'}); input {mx,my,creep,moveMag,speed,moveTag}

stateObjects.name: best / PROGRESS
stateObjects.role: Persistence read by summary + level badges + wardrobe
stateObjects.fields: best[display+'|'+mode+'|'+diffLabel]={bestScore,bestGrade,bestSurvivalMs,plays,updated} (LS_BEST); PROGRESS {unlocks,equipped.skin,stats{plays,catches,bestSurvive,hardWin,heatBest},blendbook,biomeMedals} (LS_PROGRESS)

stateObjects.name: camPan / camFollow / inspectZoomT
stateObjects.role: Camera peek/free-look + inspect zoom ease
stateObjects.fields: cam = clamp(camFollow + camPan); inspectZoomT 0..1 eased toward (ctrlMode==='INSPECT'?1:0) in updateCamera (1375); gates drawInspectOverlay at >0.01 (1811); pan caps MOVE_PEEK_MAX vs INSPECT_PAN_MAX via clampPan

functions.name: frame
functions.role: Master rAF loop: clamps realDt, ticks gfx/perf/tweens/streaks/gamepad edges, applies hitstop/slow-mo to simDt; if ROUND: fixed-step accumulator (max 5×DT_FIXED) → stepSim, ticks CAUGHT→finishRound('LOSE') after ABDUCT_CUTSCENE and TIMEOUT→finishRound('WIN') after TIMEOUT_ANIM, then drawRound()+drawRoundHUD()+drawStreaks()+flash; else drawMenu(); drawToast() always last; re-checks appState mid-frame because finishRound can flip it to SUMMARY

functions.name: boot
functions.role: Startup: ctx, glows, loadPersist+loadProgress, resize listener, visibilitychange auto-pause (2634), appState='BOOT', loadLevels().then(appState='TITLE'), starts rAF

functions.name: stepSim
functions.role: Per-fixed-step sim dispatcher: COUNTDOWN/RESUME_COUNTDOWN ticking (SFX.count/go per integer, →PLAYING at 0); HUNT → stepHunt; else hider sim: practice slow-mo (STUDIO_SLOWMO when studio/inspect open), input/move/camo, ability cooldowns, metrics accrual, timer→endRound(true), TA→stepTABeacons, HEAT escalation ramp + UFO spawning (mutates round.diff clone), spottedFlash decay

functions.name: startRound
functions.role: THE round initializer: derives seed (DAILY forces dailySeed), builds round object, resets player/abilities/split-paint, seeds rng, setActiveMap+buildOpenness+buildSky, spawns player at hider spawn (HUNT: seeker spawn + bot hiders; else UFOs), TA beacon scatter, seedAmbient LAST (RNG determinism), sets appState='ROUND', roundState='COUNTDOWN', ctrlMode='MOVE', persists lastMode/lastLevel/lastDiff

functions.name: selectLevel
functions.role: LEVEL_SELECT card handler: fetches data then PRACTICE/HEAT/DAILY start immediately; SURVIVE/HUNT/TA go to DIFFICULTY_SELECT (menuIndex=1 preselects NORMAL)

functions.name: startPlay
functions.role: TITLE→MODE_SELECT; first ever play flips settings.tutorialSeen and raises showHelp (the tutorial trigger)

functions.name: route
functions.role: MODE_SELECT→LEVEL_SELECT, stores pendingMode

functions.name: startDaily
functions.role: DAILY entry: dailySeed() (YYYYMMDD>>>0, 2380) picks level from pool, skips LEVEL/DIFFICULTY select, startRound(lv,'DAILY',DIFF.NORMAL,seed)

functions.name: makeHeatDiff
functions.role: Fresh EASY clone {label:'HEAT',heat:true,SURVIVE_TIME:Infinity,UFO_COUNT:1} — per-round mutable

functions.name: gotoTitle
functions.role: Any→TITLE: menuIndex=0, showHelp=false, stopAllLoops(); note: does NOT null round

functions.name: togglePause
functions.role: PLAYING→PAUSED (closes studio, ctrlMode='MOVE', camPan reset, menuIndex=0, stopAllLoops) or PAUSED→resumeRound(); no-op for CAUGHT/TIMEOUT/menus

functions.name: resumeRound
functions.role: PAUSED→RESUME_COUNTDOWN (0.8s, cyan countdown) → PLAYING via stepSim

functions.name: endRound
functions.role: Win path only: PLAYING→TIMEOUT + summaryT=0 + SFX.win; guarded by finalized/TIMEOUT/CAUGHT

functions.name: triggerAbduction
functions.role: Lose path: closes studio/resets ctrlMode FIRST; TA branch → respawnTA() (penalty, no game over); else roundState='CAUGHT', abductT=0, full juice burst

functions.name: finishRound
functions.role: Hider-modes scoring funnel (called from frame after cutscene/anim): score/grade math, best[key] upsert (skipped for practice), PROGRESS stats + checkUnlocks, round.summary=…, appState='SUMMARY'

functions.name: endHunt
functions.role: HUNT terminal: builds hunt summary (caught/total/score/grade), best '|HUNT|' key, PROGRESS.catches, appState='SUMMARY' directly (no TIMEOUT anim)

functions.name: endTimeAttack
functions.role: TA terminal: banked/total/score/grade, best '|TA|' key, appState='SUMMARY' directly

functions.name: stepHunt
functions.role: HUNT per-tick: fly saucer, bot think/camo, beam auto-target+charge→catch, timer→endHunt

functions.name: stepTABeacons
functions.role: TA per-tick: proximity+conceal+unseen hold→bank, timer, all-banked→endTimeAttack(true)

functions.name: respawnTA
functions.role: TA catch: respawn at hider spawn, −TA_PENALTY(12s), reset UFO suspicion, toast

functions.name: huntPulse
functions.role: HUNT scan ability (Space / A / Y / SCAN button): pings bots in HUNT_SCAN_R*1.4 with LOS

functions.name: drawMenu
functions.role: Menu dispatcher: applyScreenTransform, drawMenuBg, navList=[], branch per appState to drawBoot/drawTitle/drawModeSelect/drawLevelSelect/drawDifficulty/drawSummary/drawSettings/drawWardrobe, then drawHelp overlay if showHelp

functions.name: drawTitle
functions.role: TITLE: animated chameleon+ufo doodle, logo, buttons PLAY / Wardrobe / Settings(openSettings('TITLE')) / How to Play(showHelp) / Sound toggle, footer hint about drag-drop maps

functions.name: drawModeSelect
functions.role: MODE_SELECT: 6 cards (Practice/Survive/Heat/Daily/Hunt/Time Attack) in adaptive 1–2 col grid + Back; each card routes or startDaily()

functions.name: drawLevelSelect
functions.role: LEVEL_SELECT: adaptive grid (1–4 cols) of level cards with lazy 1px/tile thumbs (ensureThumb 2416) + PB badge (levelBadge 2384) + Back; cards push directly into navList (not via navBtn)

functions.name: drawDifficulty
functions.role: DIFFICULTY_SELECT: EASY/NORMAL/HARD rows with hunt-specific subtitles, startRound(pendingLevel,pendingMode,d) + Back

functions.name: drawSummary
functions.role: SUMMARY: headline per mode (ESCAPED/ABDUCTED, BOARD CLEARED, ALL BEACONS BANKED…), grade stamp circle, per-mode stat rows, NEW BEST banner, buttons Retry / Change-Level-or-Modes (DAILY is fixed) / Menu; self-heals to title if round.summary missing

functions.name: drawSettings
functions.role: SETTINGS: scrollable clipped panel of section/seg/slider/toggle row helpers (all push into settingsHits, NOT navList — navList=[] and menuIndex=-1 at 2515), How-to-Play row, footer Reset/Done; drag-scroll via 'sscroll' pointer role

functions.name: openSettings / closeSettings
functions.role: Settings enter/exit; settingsReturn ('TITLE'|'PAUSE') decides whether Done returns to TITLE or back into ROUND+PAUSED

functions.name: drawWardrobe
functions.role: WARDROBE: live humanoid preview, head-accent chips, biome-medal chips, Blend Book 14-terrain row, pose hint line, Back→TITLE

functions.name: drawHelp
functions.role: How-to-Play overlay (also the first-run tutorial): dark scrim + lines[] + 'Got it'; REPLACES navList/menuIndex while up; any tap/confirm/back dismisses

functions.name: drawRoundHUD
functions.role: THE in-round HUD (screen space, after drawRound): resets roundHits; HUNT→drawHuntHUD early-return; else eases mqDisplay/detDisplay, Match Meter (top-center, danger/amber/green + hazard stripes <50 + GHOST word + paintCoach nudge line 1739), Detection bar, per-mode timer panel (HEAT count-up / TA banked / SURVIVE-DAILY countdown / PRACTICE label, 1748-1758), spotted-reason banner (1760), drawThreatArrows, mode dock (🎨/👁/MATCH/🕺 64px, handedness-mirrored, 1765-1777), ⏸+🔊 top-left, MODE pill (always-visible back-to-Move target, 1780-1788), ⌖ recenter (only while panned, 1790), gated ability column (1792-1807), debug panel, drawInspectOverlay when inspectZoomT>0.01, joystick visual, drawStudio, drawCountdown/drawPause, SPOTTED! flash (1828)

functions.name: drawHuntHUD
functions.role: HUNT HUD: CAUGHT x/y panel, HUNT timer, ⏸/🔊 (own coords), SCAN button with cooldown pie (huntPulse), simplified joystick

functions.name: drawInspectOverlay
functions.role: Seeker's-eye overlay, alpha=inspectZoomT: per-UFO scan-reach rings at round.diff.SCAN_R*zoom via worldToScreen, pulsing YOU ring on-screen or cyan edge arrow (inset 40) when off-screen, top panel "👁 SEEKER'S VIEW" + paintCoach() word/% readout using PAL colors, exit hint at vpH-70

functions.name: drawThreatArrows
functions.role: Edge arrows for off-screen or chasing UFOs (inset 36): color PAL.calm/warn/danger by suspicion tier, pulse when chasing, colorblind glyphs '!'/'?'/'·' when glyphsOn, distance label in tiles as 'Nm'

functions.name: drawCountdown
functions.role: Big 3-2-1-GO center text; cyan for RESUME_COUNTDOWN, amber for initial

functions.name: drawPause
functions.role: Pause overlay AS a menu: scrim, rebuilds navList with Resume / Restart(startRound same args) / Debug toggle (practice only) / Settings(openSettings('PAUSE')) / Quit-to-Menu; clamps menuIndex (1917)

functions.name: drawDebug
functions.role: Practice-only sim readout panel (match/stillness/movement/conceal/conspicuity/terrain), toggled by [H] or pause-menu row

functions.name: drawToast / showToast
functions.role: 2.4s bottom-center banner; drawn last in frame() over everything

functions.name: navBtn
functions.role: Immediate-mode menu button: draws (selected = current menuIndex) and pushes hitbox into navList unless disabled; opts {size,sub,disabled,color,stroke,weight,rad,fill}

functions.name: menuNav / menuConfirm / menuBack / handleMenuTap
functions.role: Menu input: wrap cursor; fire selected fn; back-nav map (SETTINGS→closeSettings, WARDROBE→TITLE, MODE_SELECT→TITLE, LEVEL_SELECT→MODE_SELECT, DIFFICULTY_SELECT→LEVEL_SELECT, SUMMARY→TITLE) — showHelp swallows all three; tap hit-tests navList

functions.name: uiBtn / panel / txt / rr
functions.role: HUD primitives; txt multiplies size by hudScale (text-size setting); uiBtn pushes into roundHits

functions.name: updateGamepadEdges
functions.role: Gamepad nav: in-round (Y/X paint, RB inspect, LB match, B back-out-mode, Start pause; HUNT: A/Y pulse); menus+pause share navList nav (A confirm, B back/resume, dpad menuNav, Start unpauses)

functions.name: keydown handler
functions.role: Keyboard router: PAUSED behaves as menu (Esc/P resume, Enter/Space confirm, W/S nav); HUNT (Space pulse, Esc pause); hider round (E/P/Tab paint, I inspect, Q match, [/]/R pose, Ctrl dash, C decoy, V ink, Esc = exit mode else pause, H debug in practice, M mute); menus (Enter/Space confirm, Esc/Backspace back, arrows nav)

functions.name: onPointerDown / onPointerMove / onPointerUp
functions.role: Pointer router in priority order: SETTINGS (help-dismiss → settingsHits → scroll-drag) → menus/PAUSED (handleMenuTap) → studio (studioPointerDown → roundHits stay live → outside-panel = reticle drag or exitPaint) → roundHits → CAUGHT/TIMEOUT swallow → handed-side split: joystick spawn vs camera-pan role (pan disabled in HUNT)

functions.name: blur handler
functions.role: Focus-loss safety: clears keys/joystick/pointers, ctrlMode='MOVE', camPan reset, auto-pause if PLAYING; visibilitychange (2634) also auto-pauses

functions.name: loadLevels / fetchLevelData / buildThumb / ensureThumb / levelBadge
functions.signature: async loadLevels() / async fetchLevelData(entry) / buildThumb(map) / ensureThumb(e) / levelBadge(entry)
functions.role: Level catalog: maps/levels.json + always-appended baked map; fetch falls back to BAKED_MAP with usedBaked flag (kills PB badge); thumbs lazily built for LEVEL_SELECT

functions.name: paintCoach
functions.role: PURE READ-ONLY coach consumed by the HUD (match-meter nudge line 1739) and drawInspectOverlay readout — must never write sim state

functions.name: drawRound
functions.role: World-space render (sky→terrain→entities→beacons→abduction cutscene→vignette) — runs BEFORE drawRoundHUD each frame; alpha param currently unused at callsite (2605)

functions.name: enterPaint / exitPaint / enterInspect / exitInspect / togglePaintMode / toggleInspect
functions.role: ctrlMode transitions; both entries blocked when !PLAYING or round.mode==='HUNT'; enterPaint roots the player; enterInspect closes studio and zeroes pan

functions.name: applySettingsRuntime
functions.role: Materializes settings → FX_MOTION, shakeScale, PCAP, PAL/glyphsOn (colorblind), hcOn, hudScale, volume, dpr cap; call after ANY setting change (settings rows do this)

functions.name: resetSettings / handleSettingsTap / loadPersist / saveSettings / saveBest
functions.role: Settings persistence; resetSettings preserves lastMode/lastLevel/lastDiff/tutorialSeen; loadPersist honors prefers-reduced-motion on first run

flows: BOOT: boot() (2625) → appState='BOOT' → rAF frame loop starts drawing drawBoot() → loadLevels() resolves (or rejects) → appState='TITLE'.

MAIN MENU NAV: TITLE 'PLAY' → startPlay() (2064; first run: tutorialSeen=true + showHelp=true so the help overlay covers MODE_SELECT) → MODE_SELECT card → route(mode) sets pendingMode + appState='LEVEL_SELECT' (Daily instead calls startDaily() which skips both pickers) → level card → selectLevel(entry) (2066): PRACTICE/HEAT/DAILY startRound immediately; SURVIVE/HUNT/TA → appState='DIFFICULTY_SELECT' (menuIndex=1 = NORMAL preselected) → difficulty row → startRound(pendingLevel,pendingMode,DIFF.X).

MENU INPUT (all menu screens + pause overlay): each draw rebuilds navList via navBtn during rendering → pointerdown → handleMenuTap(sx,sy) hit-tests the last-drawn navList and fires fn; keyboard Enter/Space → menuConfirm(), Esc/Backspace → menuBack() (back map at 2313-2319), arrows → menuNav(); gamepad A/B/dpad mirrors this (839-842). showHelp intercepts and dismisses on any confirm/tap/back before normal handling.

ROUND START: startRound (2072) → seed derivation (DAILY: dailySeed always) → round object built → map/biome/sky rebuilt → player at hider spawn + UFOs (or HUNT: seeker spawn + makeBotHider×N; TA: beacon scatter) → seedAmbient() LAST → appState='ROUND', roundState='COUNTDOWN' (3s), ctrlMode='MOVE'.

ROUND FRAME: frame(now) (2588) → realDt clamp → hitstop/slow-mo → if PLAYING/COUNTDOWN/RESUME_COUNTDOWN: acc+=simDt; while acc≥DT_FIXED (≤5 steps) stepSim(1/60) → stepSim: countdown tick (SFX per integer, ≤0→'PLAYING') | HUNT→stepHunt | hider sim (practice slow-mo, input, move, camo, metrics, timer→endRound(true), TA→stepTABeacons, HEAT ramp) → back in frame: CAUGHT ticks player.abductT→finishRound('LOSE') at 1.4s; TIMEOUT ticks summaryT→finishRound('WIN') at 1.2s → updateParticles/Ambient/Anim/Camera → audio loops → drawRound() → drawRoundHUD() → drawStreaks → white flash → drawToast → rAF.

PAUSE: Esc(MOVE only)/⏸ button/Start/gamepad-9/tab-hidden/window-blur → togglePause() (2059): closes studio, ctrlMode='MOVE', camPan reset, roundState='PAUSED', menuIndex=0, stopAllLoops → drawPause (1908) rebuilds navList [Resume, Restart, (Debug in practice), Settings, Quit] → Resume→resumeRound() → 'RESUME_COUNTDOWN' 0.8s → stepSim →'PLAYING'; Settings→openSettings('PAUSE') flips appState='SETTINGS' (round frozen underneath) → Done→closeSettings() → appState='ROUND', roundState='PAUSED'; Quit→gotoTitle().

LOSE (hider): updateUfo beam completes → triggerAbduction(u) (2052): studio closed + ctrlMode reset FIRST; TA→respawnTA() (−12s, suspicion reset, toast, NO state change) else roundState='CAUGHT', player.abductT=0 → drawAbduction cutscene renders in drawRound → frame: abductT≥1.4 → finishRound('LOSE') → score/grade/best/PROGRESS → round.summary set → appState='SUMMARY' (same frame falls through to drawMenu).

WIN (hider): stepSim timer hits 0 → endRound(true) (2057) → roundState='TIMEOUT', summaryT=0 → frame: summaryT≥1.2 → finishRound('WIN') → appState='SUMMARY'. HUNT and TA skip the anim: endHunt/endTimeAttack set round.summary and appState='SUMMARY' directly from within stepSim.

SUMMARY: drawSummary (2429) reads round.summary (null→gotoTitle self-heal) → 'Retry' startRound(round.entry, round.mode, round.diff — same diff object; HEAT ramp fields recompute from DIFF.EASY each tick so this is safe by design); 'Change Level' sets pendingMode=round.mode → LEVEL_SELECT (DAILY shows 'Modes' → MODE_SELECT instead); 'Menu' → gotoTitle().

SPOTTED BANNER: updateUfo transition into CHASE/BEAM (1288) → metrics.spottedCount++, round.spottedReason=spottedReason(...), reasonUntil=now+2600, SFX/trauma/punchZoom, and if ctrlMode!=='MOVE' && !practice → force exitPaint/exitInspect + toast 'Spotted — move!' → drawRoundHUD renders '⚠ reason' panel at vpH-140 fading over 2.6s + 'SPOTTED!' flash at vpH*0.3 while round.spottedFlash>0 (decayed in stepSim 2272).

INSPECT OVERLAY: toggleInspect (key I / 👁 button / RB) → enterInspect (1052; blocked in HUNT/non-PLAYING) → ctrlMode='INSPECT' → updateCamera eases inspectZoomT→1 (zoom out to 'seeker altitude') and pan cap widens to INSPECT_PAN_MAX → drawRoundHUD calls drawInspectOverlay when inspectZoomT>0.01 (1811) → scan rings per UFO + YOU marker/edge-arrow + paintCoach readout; exit via 👁/Esc/B/MODE-pill tap → exitInspect → zoomT eases back and overlay fades below 0.01.

PAINT MODE ↔ HUD: togglePaintMode (E/P/Tab/🎨/Y/X) → enterPaint roots movement (gatherInput zeroes input while ctrlMode==='PAINT', 794) → openStudio panel drawn from drawRoundHUD (1824); studio-open pointerdown priority (932-942): studio widgets → live roundHits (MODE pill/👁/MATCH/⏸/🔊 always escape-able) → outside-panel tap = reticle drag or exitPaint; gatherInput self-heals PAINT-without-studio desync (774).

SETTINGS INPUT: onPointerDown SETTINGS branch (926): showHelp dismiss → handleSettingsTap over settingsHits (segs/sliders/toggles call applySettingsRuntime immediately) → else start 'sscroll' drag; footer Reset/Done are settingsHits too; Esc/B → menuBack → closeSettings (saves + applies + returns per settingsReturn).

TOAST: showToast(t) from anywhere (unlocks, decoy/ink, HEAT ufo joins, TA bank/catch, drag-drop load, spotted-eject) → single slot until=now+2400 → drawToast() drawn after everything in frame() with 400ms fade-out.
DRAG-DROP PLAYTEST: window 'drop' (904) → parse SCANNER json → inject default spawns if missing → push LEVELS entry → pendingMode='PRACTICE' → startRound(entry,'PRACTICE',PRACTICE_DIFF) → toast.
invariants: window.__aac diagnostic getter (2641-2669) MUST keep exposing appState, roundState, hud:_hud, mode:ctrlMode, summary, ta, hunt, paint/studio rects, cam/camPan/zoom, move/speed — the jsdom smoke harness (see project memory 'how to test the game') drives and asserts through it. Keep the classic <script> (no modules).

Determinism: stepSim only runs on the fixed accumulator (DT_FIXED=1/60, ≤5 steps/frame); the seeded rng stream must be consumed ONLY by gameplay setup in order — seedAmbient() is deliberately called AFTER entities in startRound (2117 comment) so DAILY (fixed dailySeed, retry can't reroll — 2073) stays reproducible. Never insert rng() calls before entity spawning or in render.

navList/roundHits/settingsHits are immediate-mode: rebuilt during every draw of their screen (drawMenu 2328, drawPause 1911, drawHelp 2583, drawSettings 2465/2515, drawRoundHUD 1718). Any new screen/overlay must clear+rebuild its list each frame or stale hitboxes from the previous screen will fire.

Every transition OUT of PLAYING must close the studio and reset ctrlMode='MOVE' + camPan (pattern at triggerAbduction 2053 'reset BEFORE the TA respawn so mode never leaks', endRound 2058, togglePause 2060, blur 891, spotted-eject 1292). New end/interrupt paths must repeat this.

Terminal-state guards: endRound checks finalized||TIMEOUT||CAUGHT; finishRound/endHunt/endTimeAttack check round.finalized — every new end path needs the same idempotence guard because frame() can race a same-frame appState flip (it re-checks appState at 2602/2607).
paintCoach() and drawInspectOverlay are READ-ONLY on the sim (P8 contract, comments at 530, 1830). HUD may ease its own display copies (mqDisplay/detDisplay) but must never write player.mq/C/S.

HUD state colors must go through PAL (CB_PAL per colorblind setting, 567) with glyphsOn fallbacks (threat arrows 1890, inspect readout 1849); text sizes through txt()'s hudScale; handedness mirroring via settings.handed in drawRoundHUD (1767) and drawHuntHUD (1865) and the joystick-side split in onPointerDown (948).

The MODE pill (1780-1788) is the guaranteed always-tappable 'back to Move' target, and roundHits stay live while the studio is open (935-936) — never occlude or drop these; a rooted PAINT state with no exit is the failure this design prevents (see also the gatherInput self-heal at 774).

HEAT must mutate only its per-round diff clone from makeHeatDiff() (comment 2260: 'never the shared const') and recompute ramp fields from the DIFF.EASY base each tick — this is why summary-Retry reusing the mutated clone self-heals (2270).

practice-only affordances: STUDIO_SLOWMO (2239), debug toggle (pause row 1914, [H] 875), no timer/best-key writes (2290, 2450); PRACTICE_DIFF has LOCK_TIME/SURVIVE_TIME Infinity — code testing 'can you lose' must check round.diff.practice.

drawRoundHUD's HUNT early-return (1719-1722) means all hider HUD (meters, coach, threat arrows, mode dock, abilities, inspect) is implicitly hider-only; enterPaint/enterInspect also hard-block HUNT (1048/1052). New HUD elements must decide which side of this fork they live on.

best[] keys are `entry.display+'|'+mode+'|'+diff.label` (2290, 2166, 2223) and settings.lastMode/lastLevel/lastDiff persist from startRound (2120) — renaming modes or level display strings orphans PBs.
gotchas: drawLevelSelect's subtitle (2388) is hardcoded to 'Practice / Zen' : 'Survive' — for HEAT/HUNT/TA pendingMode it wrongly says 'Survive'. Fix here when polishing.

SETTINGS is pointer-only: drawSettings sets navList=[] and menuIndex=-1 (2515), and rows/footer live in settingsHits, so keyboard/gamepad users can only Esc/B out — menuConfirm silently does nothing there. A keyboard pass must build navList entries for rows.
menuHits (753) is dead code — real menu hit-testing moved to navList; don't extend it.
closeSettings only knows two return targets ('PAUSE'→ROUND/PAUSED, else TITLE). Opening settings from a future screen requires extending settingsReturn, or Done will teleport to TITLE.

roundState is stale outside ROUND (e.g. stays 'CAUGHT' on the summary screen) and gotoTitle()/finishRound never null `round` — __aac and drawSummary rely on the stale round; guard any new code with appState==='ROUND' before trusting roundState/round.
drawSummary can call gotoTitle() during a draw pass (2429 self-heal) — a state transition inside a render function; keep new screens tolerant of appState changing between draw and input.
Escape in-round is overloaded (874): exits PAINT, else exits INSPECT, else pauses — new modal overlays must slot into this chain or Esc will pause underneath them.
Keyboard input is swallowed while the DOM #hex input is focused (850) — the paint studio hex field; remember when adding global hotkeys.

drawInspectOverlay draws scan rings using round.diff.SCAN_R for ALL ufos (1836) — correct today because SCAN_R is per-difficulty uniform, but per-UFO scan radii would silently render wrong here (and in beaconSeen 2196).
drawThreatArrows projects UFOs with inline math (1878) instead of worldToScreen() — duplicate projection; keep in sync if camera math changes.

First-run tutorial trigger lives in startPlay() (2064) and flips tutorialSeen immediately — if the player quits before reading, it never auto-shows again; drawHelp is also reachable from TITLE and SETTINGS, and it hijacks navList/menuIndex while open (2583).
HUNT pause/mute buttons in drawHuntHUD use their own hardcoded coords (1863-1864, left side) while hider HUD uses `edge`-based coords (1778) — two places to touch when moving top-left HUD chrome.
Toast is a single slot (917) — rapid unlock+bank sequences overwrite each other; a queue is a known polish target.

frame() checks appState==='ROUND' twice (2594, 2602) because finishRound inside the CAUGHT/TIMEOUT branch flips to SUMMARY mid-frame, after which drawMenu runs that same frame (2607) — preserve this ordering when refactoring the loop.
Gamepad Start while PAUSED resumes via edge(9) at 838 and ALSO would hit togglePause path if the早 return were removed — the `return` after resumeRound is load-bearing.
TA abduction is NOT a loss: triggerAbduction branches to respawnTA() before setting CAUGHT (2054) — any new 'on caught' hook must go before that branch or TA never sees it.
LEVEL_SELECT cards bypass navBtn and push into navList manually (2412) so their selected-state drawing is duplicated (2400-2402) — restyle both places.
drawRound takes an `alpha` param (1410) that the callsite never passes (2605) — vestigial; don't rely on it.
extensionPoints: New screen: add an appState string; add a draw branch in drawMenu (2328); add its back-route in menuBack (2313); enter via a navBtn fn anywhere (e.g. drawTitle 2354-2359). Keyboard/gamepad/tap support is free if all interactive elements go through navBtn.

New round mode: (1) card in drawModeSelect's modes[] (2364-2371) calling route('X') or a custom starter like startDaily (2381); (2) branch in selectLevel (2066) — start directly or fall through to DIFFICULTY_SELECT; (3) mode-specific init block in startRound after generic setup (pattern: HUNT block 2094, TA block 2107); (4) per-tick hook in stepSim (dispatch like `if(round.mode==='HUNT'){stepHunt(dt);return;}` 2238 or post-sim like stepTABeacons 2259); (5) terminal fn cloned from endTimeAttack (2215) — set round.summary with a discriminator flag and appState='SUMMARY'; (6) headline+stat rows branch in drawSummary (2431, 2439); (7) timer-panel variant in drawRoundHUD (1748-1758); (8) export a debug blob in window.__aac (pattern: `ta:` 2651, `hunt:` 2652) so the smoke harness can drive it.

Camera-lock / zoom features: computeZoom (1372) derives zoomBase from TARGET_VISIBLE_TILES — add per-mode multipliers there or blend a new 0..1 ease like inspectZoomT in updateCamera (1373-1389, the `zt` lerp at 1375); pan caps are chosen at the two clampPan callsites (972 in onPointerMove, 1389 in updateCamera) keyed on ctrlMode — extend both; recenter affordance already exists (drawRoundHUD 1790, RECENTER_SHOW threshold).

Paint-flow features: mode dock buttons in drawRoundHUD (1770-1776) — add uiBtn + pushMode('id',…) so _hud.modeButtons/tests see them; enter/exit lifecycle fns at 1048-1056 (respect the HUNT/PLAYING guards and the studio-close discipline); coach copy hooks in paintCoach (532) and its two render sites (match-meter line 1739, inspect panel 1849); studio panel itself in drawStudio (1922) + studioRects (1070); keyboard at 866-877, gamepad at 831-834.

Maps: loadLevels (446) reads maps/levels.json entries {file,name,display}; entry shape is {file,name,display,data,loaded,thumb}; drag-drop injection pattern at 904-916 (validates grid/terrain, injects default spawns, appends to LEVELS, starts Practice) — reuse for downloadable/user maps; drawLevelSelect grid (2386) auto-scales to any LEVELS.length; PB badge via levelBadge (2384) keys on display string; tools/validate-maps.mjs (untracked, repo root) is the validator to keep in sync.

Progression: finishRound (2275) is the single hider-mode funnel — add score terms/metrics there and mirror in endHunt/endTimeAttack; new metrics accrue in stepSim's metrics block (2252-2257); unlock rules in checkUnlocks (615) + grantUnlock toasts (608); surfacing in drawWardrobe (2526: accent chips, medal chips, Blend Book row) and drawSummary stat rows (2438-2449).
Pause menu rows: append navBtn calls in drawPause (1908-1917) — keyboard/gamepad free; keep the menuIndex clamp (1917) last.

Settings rows: use the seg/slider/toggle helpers inside drawSettings (2472-2491) — they auto-register settingsHits and call applySettingsRuntime; add the runtime mapping in applySettingsRuntime (638) and defaults in the settings literal (560) + resetSettings (2521).

Toasts/banners: showToast (917) for transient text; the spotted-reason panel pattern (round.spottedReason/reasonUntil set at 1289, drawn at 1760) is the template for timed contextual banners; full-screen stingers follow the spottedFlash pattern (set 0.3+ at event, decay in stepSim 2272, draw at 1828).

Threat/target indicators: drawThreatArrows (1875) — iterate additional threat arrays with the same edge-projection math; the drawInspectOverlay edge-arrow (1842-1847) is the reusable 'point at off-screen thing' snippet.

Tutorial/how-to: content is the lines[] array in drawHelp (2569-2581); triggers are startPlay first-run (2064), TITLE button (2358), SETTINGS row (2510) — a step-based interactive tutorial should replace the showHelp boolean with its own appState screen per the 'new screen' recipe.

concern: PROGRESSION & PERSISTENCE in /workspaces/abduct_a_chameleon/index.html (single classic <script>, ~2674 lines): PROGRESS store + LS keys, SKINS/poses/medals unlock pipeline, Blend Book, Wardrobe UI, per-round stats, summary scoring/bests, daily seed — mapped for extending with XP/challenges, more cosmetics, and map unlocks.

stateObjects.name: LS_* localStorage keys
stateObjects.role: All persistence. Three independent versioned keys, each saved/loaded whole with try/catch fail-soft.
stateObjects.fields: LS_BEST='aac.best.v1' (line 104, per-level/mode/diff PBs), LS_SETTINGS='aac.settings.v1' (line 104), LS_PROGRESS='aac.progress.v1' (line 575, unlocks/stats/blendbook)

stateObjects.name: PROGRESS
stateObjects.role: The single progression store (serialized to LS_PROGRESS). Everything unlockable lives here.
stateObjects.fields: unlocks:['default','stand','wave','crouch'] (flat string-id array holding BOTH skin ids and pose ids), equipped:{skin:'default'} (single equip slot), stats:{plays,catches,bestSurvive,hardWin,heatBest}, blendbook:{terrainKey→{logged:bool,bestMq:0..1,biome}}, biomeMedals:{biomeKey→true}

stateObjects.name: SKINS / SKIN_BY
stateObjects.role: Head-accent cosmetic catalog. 5 base entries (default/antenna/shades/crown/halo) + 6 'medal_<biome>' entries pushed in a loop at 594-601. SKIN_BY id-index at 605.
stateObjects.fields: {id, name, unlock:(null|string — string is DISPLAY METADATA only, never matched; actual check is hasUnlock(s.id)), hint:'Play 3 rounds', draw:(hx,headR,alpha)=>canvas ops, medal?:true}

stateObjects.name: POSES / POSE_KEYS / POSE_NAMES / UNLOCKABLE_POSES
stateObjects.role: Pose catalog (1502-1509: stand/armsout/cheer/point/wave/crouch as {L:[ang,len],R:[ang,len],body,waveR?}). UNLOCKABLE_POSES=['armsout','cheer','point'] at line 606; stand/wave/crouch free. player.pose is session-only, never persisted.
stateObjects.fields: POSE_KEYS array (1500), POSE_NAMES labels (1501), POSES geometry (1502)

stateObjects.name: BIOME_MEMBERS / BLENDBOOK_KEYS
stateObjects.role: Medal-completion tables. BIOME_MEMBERS inverts BIOME_TERRAINS (line 149) into biome→[terrains]; BLENDBOOK_KEYS = PRESET_ORDER minus void/lava = 14 loggable terrains (604).
stateObjects.fields: BIOME_TERRAINS maps only 12 terrains (2 per biome: grass+foliage→greenwood, sand+dirt→dunes, snow+ice→tundra, concrete+metal→downtown, moss+crystal→xeno, mud+water→bog); rock and ash belong to NO biome

stateObjects.name: best
stateObjects.role: PB table (serialized to LS_BEST). Keyed by stable string `entry.display+'|'+mode+'|'+diff.label` (e.g. 'Prototype Meadow (baked)|SURVIVE|HARD').
stateObjects.fields: best[key] = {bestScore, bestGrade, plays, bestSurvivalMs (survive mode only), updated:Date.now()}

stateObjects.name: round.metrics
stateObjects.role: Per-round stat accumulator, reset in startRound, accumulated in stepSim (2252-2257), consumed by finishRound scoring.
stateObjects.fields: {survivalMs, blendAccum (∫mq dt), lowDetectMs (C<WELL_HIDDEN_C=0.30), streakBestMs/streakCur (C<STREAK_C=0.35 && maxSusp<ENTER_CHASE=0.85), spottedCount, nearMisses, timeMovingMs, timeStillMs, ghostMs}

stateObjects.name: round._blendHold
stateObjects.role: Blend Book dwell timer {key,t}, reset per round; requires BLEND_LOG_HOLD=1.0s continuous qualifying blend (constants at line 62: BLEND_LOG_MQ=0.85, BLEND_LOG_HOLD=1.0).
stateObjects.fields: {key:terrainKey|null, t:seconds}

stateObjects.name: round.summary
stateObjects.role: Summary-screen payload. Survive shape at 2288-2289 {outcome,score,grade,survSec,avgBlendPct,streak,near,spotted,ghostSec,isBest,prevBest,t0}; Hunt variant at 2164-2165 adds {hunt:true,caught,total,timeUsed} with blend fields zeroed; TA variant at 2221-2222 adds {ta:true,banked,total}.
stateObjects.fields: also mirrored to window.__aac.state.summary (2648)

stateObjects.name: settings (progression-relevant slice)
stateObjects.role: LS_SETTINGS carries lastMode/lastLevel/lastDiff (written at end of startRound, 2120, feeds levelBadge PB lookup) plus tutorialSeen/controlsSeen one-shots.
stateObjects.fields: lastMode:'SURVIVE', lastLevel:0, lastDiff:'NORMAL', tutorialSeen, controlsSeen

stateObjects.name: LEVELS
stateObjects.role: Level manifest — the map-unlock extension target. Filled by loadLevels() (446) from maps/levels.json + baked prototype appended (457). NO lock/unlock field exists today; every entry is always selectable.
stateObjects.fields: {file, name, display, data, loaded, thumb, usedBaked?, _loading?}

functions.name: hasUnlock
functions.role: THE unlock check, everywhere: PROGRESS.unlocks.indexOf(id)>=0. Used by wardrobe chips (2530, 2544), cyclePose filter (1511), pose row label (2561).

functions.name: grantUnlock
functions.role: THE grant choke point: pushes id into PROGRESS.unlocks, saveProgress(), toast '★ Unlocked: <SKIN_BY[id].name+' skin' || POSE_NAMES[id] || id>', SFX.best(). Idempotent via hasUnlock guard.

functions.name: loadProgress
functions.role: Parses LS_PROGRESS; Object.assign(PROGRESS,p) then PROGRESS.unlocks=p.unlocks (stored array REPLACES defaults wholesale); back-compat defaults for equipped (611), blendbook/biomeMedals (612). New PROGRESS fields must be defaulted here.

functions.name: saveProgress
functions.role: JSON.stringify(PROGRESS) → LS_PROGRESS, try/catch.

functions.name: checkUnlocks
functions.role: The entire unlock rulebook (5 lines): plays>=3→'antenna'; bestSurvive>=60→'shades'+'armsout'; hardWin>=1→'crown'+'cheer'; catches>=5→'halo'+'point'; bestSurvive>=100→'cheer'. Called after every round from finishRound (2299), endHunt (2169), endTimeAttack (2226). stats.heatBest is tracked but NEVER read here — dormant hook.

functions.name: updateBlendBook
functions.role: Per-sim-tick (called from stepSim 2257). Gate: terrain in BLENDBOOK_KEYS && player.mq>=0.85 && player.C<0.30 && player.S>=0.9 && round.maxSusp<0.85; dwell 1.0s on same dominantKey via round._blendHold, then logBlend. READ-ONLY on the sim by design.

functions.name: logBlend
functions.role: Writes PROGRESS.blendbook[key]={logged:true,bestMq:max,biome:round.biome}; first-time toast '★ <TERRAIN_NAME> blended!'+SFX.best; saveProgress on first/improved; first-time → checkBiomeMedals().

functions.name: checkBiomeMedals
functions.role: For each biome in BIOME_MEMBERS: if every member terrain logged → PROGRESS.biomeMedals[b]=true + grantUnlock('medal_'+b) (medal skins are the only case where s.unlock===s.id).

functions.name: cyclePose
functions.role: Filters POSE_KEYS by (not in UNLOCKABLE_POSES || hasUnlock), cycles player.pose, toast. Bound to BracketLeft/BracketRight/KeyR (869-870) and the 🕺 HUD button (1776).

functions.name: drawHumanoid (skin hook)
functions.role: Cosmetic render point: `if(o.skin && o.skin!=='default'){ SKIN_BY[o.skin].draw(hx,headR,eyeA*0.85) }` — accent alpha tied to eyeA so cosmetics fade with concealment. Player passes skin:PROGRESS.equipped.skin from drawChameleon (1584); wardrobe preview passes it at 2528.

functions.name: startRound
functions.role: Resets round.metrics (2091) and round._blendHold (2092); DAILY re-derives dailySeed() when fixedSeed==null (2073) so retry can't reroll; seeds rng=mulberry32(seed) (2083); persists lastMode/lastLevel/lastDiff (2120).

functions.name: finishRound
functions.role: Survive/Heat/Daily scoring: score = survSec*10 + round(avgBlend*500) + round(lowDetectSec*6) + round(streakSec*8) + nearMisses*150 − spottedCount*40 + (win? 300+diffIndex*200 : 0), floor 0 (2280-2283). Grade from perf=0.6*survRatio+0.4*quality vs GRADE thresholds S:0.92/A:0.80/B:0.66/C:0.50/D:0.34 (line 103). Non-practice: best[display|mode|diffLabel] update + saveBest (2290-2294). Stats: plays++, bestSurvive=max, hardWin++ if WIN&&HARD&&!practice, heatBest=max if heat (2296-2298); saveProgress(); checkUnlocks() (2299); appState='SUMMARY'.

functions.name: endHunt
functions.role: Hunt scoring: score=max(0, caught*200 + (win? timeLeft*5:0) − missed*30); grade from perf=0.7*ratio+0.3*(1−timeUsed/HUNT_TIME). best key '<display>|HUNT|<diff>' (2166-2168). Stats: plays++, catches+=caught (feeds 'halo'/'point' unlock) (2169).

functions.name: endTimeAttack
functions.role: TA scoring: score=max(0, banked*300 + (win? round(timeLeft*10):0)); perf=0.6*ratio+0.4*(tl/TA_TIME). best key '<display>|TA|<diff>' (2223-2225). Stats: only plays++ (2226).

functions.name: dailySeed
functions.role: Local-date YYYYMMDD>>>0. Deterministic per calendar day per timezone.

functions.name: startDaily
functions.role: Level = pool[seed % pool.length] where pool=LEVELS minus last entry (excludes baked prototype); startRound(lv,'DAILY',DIFF.NORMAL,seed).

functions.name: levelBadge
functions.role: 'PB <score> (<grade>)' from best[display|pendingMode|(PRACTICE||settings.lastDiff)]; suppressed if entry.usedBaked. Rendered on LEVEL_SELECT cards (2411).

functions.name: drawSummary
functions.role: Summary screen: outcome banner, grade stamp, mode-specific stat rows (TA 2439 / Hunt 2440 / Survive 2442-2448: Survived, Avg blend, Time as ghost, Longest streak, Near misses, Times spotted, Score), '★ NEW BEST!' or 'Best N (+delta)' if !practice (2450-2451), Retry/Change Level/Menu buttons (DAILY is fixedMode: no level re-pick, 2453-2456).

functions.name: drawWardrobe
functions.role: WARDROBE screen: live humanoid preview with equipped skin (2528); chip(s,x,y,w) closure (2530-2537) renders lock state (unlock===null||hasUnlock(s.id)), equipped highlight, and pushes navList tap → {PROGRESS.equipped.skin=s.id; saveProgress()}; HEAD ACCENTS row = SKINS.filter(!medal) (2540); BIOME MEDALS 'n/6' row = SKINS.filter(medal) (2547-2552); BLEND BOOK 'n/14' row of terrain swatches with bestMq% stamped on logged pages (2554-2559); poses shown as TEXT ONLY with 🔒 per locked pose (2561) — no pose tap targets.

functions.name: loadPersist / saveBest / saveSettings
functions.role: Settings+best load (2618-2621); writers at 2622-2623. loadProgress is separate, called from boot() at 2629.

functions.name: boot
functions.role: Startup order: buildGlows → loadPersist() + loadProgress() (2629) → resize → loadLevels().then(appState='TITLE') → rAF(frame).

functions.name: window.__aac state hook
functions.role: Headless-test hook; progression slice at 2662: progress:{blendbook, biomeMedals, unlocks}; also summary (2648), pose (2650), snapCount/ghostMs (2660). The jsdom smoke harness depends on this shape.

functions.name: showToast
functions.role: 2.4s toast used for every unlock/log event.

flows: STAT-BASED SKIN/POSE UNLOCK: round ends → finishRound('WIN'|'LOSE') (2275) [or endHunt 2156 / endTimeAttack 2215] → PROGRESS.stats mutated (plays++ always; bestSurvive/hardWin at 2296-2297; catches in endHunt 2169) → saveProgress() → checkUnlocks() (615) compares stats to hardcoded thresholds → grantUnlock(id) (608) pushes id to PROGRESS.unlocks + saveProgress + toast '★ Unlocked' + SFX.best → next drawWardrobe() (2526) shows chip unlocked via hasUnlock(s.id); next cyclePose (1511) includes the pose.

BLEND BOOK → MEDAL: frame() (2588) → stepSim(DT_FIXED) (2229) → updateBlendBook(dt) (2257→622) → gate (terrain in BLENDBOOK_KEYS && mq>=BLEND_LOG_MQ 0.85 && C<WELL_HIDDEN_C 0.30 && S>=0.9 && round.maxSusp<ENTER_CHASE 0.85) → round._blendHold.t accumulates; t>=BLEND_LOG_HOLD 1.0s → logBlend(key, mq) (628) → blendbook[key]={logged:true,bestMq} + first-time toast/SFX + saveProgress → checkBiomeMedals() (635) → all BIOME_MEMBERS[b] logged → biomeMedals[b]=true + grantUnlock('medal_'+b) → medal chip lights in Wardrobe (2547-2552) and Blend Book swatch shows bestMq% (2559).

PB / BEST SCORE: finishRound (2275) computes score+grade → if !round.diff.practice: key=display+'|'+mode+'|'+diff.label (2290) → b=best[key]||{bestScore:0,...}; summary.prevBest=b.bestScore; summary.isBest=score>b.bestScore; b.plays++; update bestScore/bestGrade/bestSurvivalMs/updated → best[key]=b; saveBest() (2623 → LS_BEST); isBest→SFX.best → appState='SUMMARY' → drawSummary (2429) renders '★ NEW BEST!' (2450) → later LEVEL_SELECT card shows levelBadge PB (2384/2411).

DAILY: MODE_SELECT 'Daily Challenge' (2368) → startDaily() (2381): seed=dailySeed() (2380, local YYYYMMDD) → level=pool[seed%pool.length] (pool excludes baked last entry) → startRound(lv,'DAILY',DIFF.NORMAL,seed) → rng=mulberry32(seed) (2083); seedAmbient() AFTER entity spawns (2117) keeps run reproducible → summary Retry calls startRound(entry,'DAILY',diff) with no seed but line 2073 re-derives dailySeed() → same-day retry = identical map+seed; PB key '<display>|DAILY|NORMAL'.

WARDROBE EQUIP: TITLE '👕 Wardrobe' navBtn (2356) → appState='WARDROBE' → drawMenu (2336) → drawWardrobe each frame rebuilds navList → tap chip (handleMenuTap 2320) → fn: PROGRESS.equipped.skin=s.id; saveProgress(); SFX.ui (2537) → drawChameleon passes skin:PROGRESS.equipped.skin (1584) → drawHumanoid draws SKIN_BY[skin].draw(hx,headR,eyeA*0.85) (1577), fading with concealment → back: navBtn (2563) or menuBack (2315) → TITLE.

POSE USE: keydown BracketLeft/BracketRight/KeyR (869-870) or HUD 🕺 (1776) → cyclePose(d) (1511) filters POSE_KEYS by UNLOCKABLE_POSES∖unlocks → player.pose set (session-only, not saved) → drawHumanoid geometry from POSES[o.pose] (1525); Wardrobe merely lists poses with 🔒 markers (2561).

PERSISTENCE LIFECYCLE: boot() (2625) → loadPersist() (2618: settings→applySettingsRuntime, best) + loadProgress() (610: merge + back-compat defaults) → gameplay writes via saveProgress (grantUnlock 608, logBlend 633, equip 2537, end-of-round 2299/2169/2226), saveBest (2294/2168/2225), saveSettings (startRound 2120, settings screen) → all three try/catch no-throw.

PER-ROUND STAT ACCUMULATION: startRound zeroes round.metrics (2091) + _blendHold (2092) → stepSim per fixed tick (2252-2257): survivalMs, blendAccum+=mq*dt, lowDetectMs (C<0.30), ghostMs (conceal>=GHOST_C), streak windows (C<0.35 && maxSusp<0.85), moving/still split; spottedCount/nearMisses set in UFO logic (1286-1289) → consumed once by finishRound.
invariants: window.__aac.state must keep its shape — especially progress:{blendbook,biomeMedals,unlocks} (2662), summary (2648), pose (2650) — the jsdom smoke harness (see MEMORY: how-to-test-the-game) reads it; the file must stay a classic <script> (no modules).
updateBlendBook/logBlend are READ-ONLY on the sim (comment at 621): progression code called from stepSim must never mutate player/round physics or camo state, or determinism and tests break.

Seeded-RNG order: gameplay entities consume rng before seedAmbient() (2117) — any new progression code must NOT consume `rng` during startRound or per-tick, or DAILY reproducibility breaks (use non-seeded Math.random or pure derivations instead).
DAILY always re-derives dailySeed() inside startRound when fixedSeed==null (2073) — retry can never reroll; keep this if adding daily streaks/rewards.
Cosmetics must never break camo: skin draw alpha is tied to eyeA*0.85 (1577) so accents fade with concealment — any new cosmetic slot must inherit this fade.

grantUnlock is idempotent (hasUnlock guard) and checkUnlocks may be called after every round with no double-grant/toast spam — keep new unlock rules threshold-style (monotonic stats), or guard event-style grants yourself.
All localStorage IO stays inside try/catch (works under file:// and blocked-storage contexts); a save failure must never throw into the frame loop.

best[] keys are the stable string `entry.display+'|'+MODE+'|'+DIFF.label` — renaming a level display or diff label silently orphans PBs; practice rounds must never write best[] (guard at 2290, drawSummary guard at 2450).

loadProgress back-compat pattern: after Object.assign, every newer PROGRESS field needs an explicit default (see 611-612); PROGRESS.unlocks is REPLACED by the stored array, so any new default-unlocked id must be migrated in loadProgress, not just added to the literal at 576.
checkUnlocks/grantUnlock run before appState='SUMMARY' — unlock toasts render over the summary screen via drawToast (2609); keep grant calls before that state switch so the toast timing works.
gotchas: SKINS[].unlock strings ('plays3','survive60','hardWin','hunt5') are DECORATIVE — nothing ever matches them. The real system: checkUnlocks grants the SKIN'S id ('antenna','shades',...) and UI checks hasUnlock(s.id); `unlock:null` merely means 'always unlocked'. Only medal skins have unlock===id. A new skin added to SKINS with an `unlock` string does NOTHING until you also wire a grantUnlock(skin.id) call.

BIOME_TERRAINS (149) covers only 12 of the 14 BLENDBOOK_KEYS — 'rock' and 'ash' map to no biome, so each biome medal actually requires just 2 terrains despite the 'Blend every X terrain' hint, and rock/ash only affect the 14/14 Blend Book counter, never a medal.
PROGRESS.stats.heatBest is written (2298) but never read by checkUnlocks — a dormant unlock hook; also endHunt line 2169 contains a no-op `heatBest=Math.max(heatBest||0,0)`.
'cheer' has two grant paths (hardWin>=1 at 618 AND bestSurvive>=100 at 620); hunt catches only accrue via endHunt (2169) — Survive-mode rounds never touch stats.catches.
Hunt and TA rounds do NOT update bestSurvive/hardWin (only plays/catches), so playing only those modes can never unlock shades/armsout/crown/cheer.
player.pose and poseIdx are session state — the equipped pose is not persisted (only equipped.skin is); startRound doesn't reset pose, so it carries across rounds but not reloads.

fetchLevelData falls back to BAKED_MAP on fetch failure and sets entry.usedBaked (467): levelBadge hides the PB badge then (2384), but finishRound still WRITES best[] under the original display key — PBs earned on a fallback map pollute the real level's key.

drawWardrobe rows are single-line flex: chip width Math.min(52,(vpW-40)/accents.length) (2542) — adding many skins shrinks chips toward unusable; adding a 7th biome breaks the hardcoded '/ 6' label (2550) and mcw divisor 6 (2551); Blend Book similarly hardcodes '/ 14' (2554) and single-row layout.
grantUnlock's toast label falls back to POSE_NAMES[id]||id (609) — non-skin, non-pose unlock ids (e.g. future map ids) will toast the raw id string unless you extend that lookup.
resetSettings (2521) resets only settings — there is NO reset path for PROGRESS or best anywhere in the UI (manual localStorage.removeItem only).
drawSummary reads round.diff.practice and round.entry/mode for buttons (2450-2456) — summary rendering depends on `round` still being alive; don't null it on finalize.
menuBack (2313-2319) special-cases WARDROBE with an early return BEFORE the state-machine chain — new screens need their own early-return clause there.
dailySeed uses LOCAL date (2380) — daily rolls over at local midnight, differs across timezones; fine offline, matters if multiplayer/leaderboards come.

checkUnlocks thresholds use PROGRESS.stats which was loaded wholesale from storage — a hand-edited/corrupt stats object (e.g. missing fields) is only protected by `||0` at some sites (hardWin, heatBest, bestSurvive) but bare `st.plays`/`st.catches` at 616/619 would be undefined→false, silently never unlocking.
extensionPoints: XP SYSTEM: add PROGRESS.xp/level to the literal (576) + default in loadProgress (after 612). Award XP where score is finalized — finishRound right after line 2295 ('progression stats' block), endHunt after 2169, endTimeAttack after 2226 — e.g. xp += Math.round(score/10) + firstClearBonus. Show gain in drawSummary (insert a stat row before the isBest block at 2450) and a level bar in drawWardrobe header (~2528). Expose in __aac progress object (2662) so the smoke harness can assert it.

CHALLENGE/QUEST UNLOCKS: model on the Blend Book. Add PROGRESS.challenges={id:{done,progress}}; write a checkChallenges(summaryOrEvent) called from the same three end-of-round sites as checkUnlocks (2299/2169/2226) for round-shaped goals ('win NORMAL with 0 spotted' — read round.summary/round.metrics there), and from logBlend (628) / triggerAbduction / huntPulse for event-shaped goals. Grant rewards through grantUnlock so toast+save+idempotency come free; extend the label lookup at 609 for new reward kinds.

MORE COSMETICS (same slot): push entries into SKINS (579-601) with draw:(hx,headR,alpha); wire the grant as a new threshold line in checkUnlocks (615-620) or a grantUnlock call at the triggering event. Wardrobe HEAD ACCENTS row auto-includes them (2540-2544) but convert that row to a wrapping grid once count exceeds ~8 (chip() at 2530 already takes x,y,w — just compute multi-row positions like the Blend Book loop at 2556).

NEW EQUIP SLOTS (trails, footstep FX, body pattern): extend PROGRESS.equipped (add defaults in loadProgress line 611, e.g. equipped.trail='none'); thread through drawChameleon opts (1584) into drawHumanoid — add a second hook next to the skin hook (1577) or, for trails, emit in updateChameleonAnim (1514)/maybeFootstep; add a new chip section in drawWardrobe reusing the chip() closure (2530) with a slot parameter so tap sets equipped[slot]. Keep the eyeA-fade rule.

MAP UNLOCKS: add `unlock:'<id>'` per entry in maps/levels.json (parsed at 453 — carry the field into the LEVELS entry) with baked prototype always free (457). Gate in drawLevelSelect (2398-2413): if(e.unlock && !hasUnlock(e.unlock)) draw the card dimmed with a 🔒 + hint and SKIP navList.push (2412); also guard selectLevel (2066) and exclude locked levels from startDaily's pool (2382) or dailies can pick a locked map. Grant via grantUnlock(e.unlock) from checkUnlocks/challenges (e.g. 'win NORMAL on the previous map' — read best[] keys, which already encode level+mode+diff). Extend grantUnlock's toast label (609) with a LEVEL name lookup.

MORE POSES: add geometry to POSES (1502), label to POSE_NAMES (1501), key to POSE_KEYS (1500), id to UNLOCKABLE_POSES (606), grant line in checkUnlocks. cyclePose (1511) and the wardrobe lock row (2561) pick them up automatically. To make poses equippable/persistent, add PROGRESS.equipped.pose and apply it in startRound (~2089).

MORE BIOMES/TERRAINS FOR MEDALS: BIOME_MEMBERS/BLENDBOOK_KEYS derive automatically from BIOME_TERRAINS (149) and PRESET_ORDER (129), and the medal-skin loop (594) derives from BIOME_LABEL (593) — but you must also fix the hardcoded wardrobe labels '/ 6' (2550), divisor 6 (2551), '/ 14' (2554). Consider mapping the orphaned 'rock'/'ash' terrains into biomes to make medals honest.

DAILY STREAKS/REWARDS: add PROGRESS.daily={lastDay,streak} defaulted in loadProgress; in finishRound, inside the !practice branch (2290), if(round.mode==='DAILY') compare dailySeed() to lastDay, bump streak, grantUnlock streak cosmetics. dailySeed (2380) is the canonical day key; DAILY PB already isolated under '<display>|DAILY|NORMAL'.

NEW TRACKED STATS: add fields to round.metrics init (2091), accumulate in the stepSim block (2252-2257) or UFO events (1286-1289), fold into PROGRESS.stats in finishRound (2295-2298) with `||0` back-compat, surface in drawSummary stat rows (2442-2448) and __aac (2660-2662).

SCHEMA MIGRATION: if PROGRESS shape changes incompatibly, bump LS_PROGRESS to 'aac.progress.v2' and read/upgrade the v1 blob inside loadProgress (610) — the versioned-key convention is already established (aac.best.v1/aac.settings.v1/aac.progress.v1).

concern: MAPS & TERRAIN in /workspaces/abduct_a_chameleon/index.html (single classic <script>, ~2674 lines) + /workspaces/abduct_a_chameleon/tools/generate-levels.mjs — map loading/fallback, scanner-map format, terrain palette/texture baking, cover/objects, biomes, camo sampling (terrainReference/tones), spawns per mode, drag-drop custom maps; groundwork for adding bigger hand-crafted maps.

stateObjects.name: TERRAIN_HEX / TERRAIN_NAME / PRESET_ORDER / TERRAIN_RGB
stateObjects.role: THE terrain palette. 16 keys: void grass dirt water rock concrete foliage metal sand snow ice mud moss lava ash crystal. TERRAIN_RGB is filled from TERRAIN_HEX in boot() (line 2626) and is the ground truth for all camo math. PRESET_ORDER (129) drives the 16 paint-preset swatches AND (filtered) the Blend Book.
stateObjects.fields: TERRAIN_HEX {key:'#rrggbb'}, TERRAIN_NAME {key:label}, PRESET_ORDER [16 keys], TERRAIN_RGB {key:{r,g,b}}

stateObjects.name: MOVE_MULT / ICE_MOMENTUM_TAU
stateObjects.role: Per-terrain movement multipliers used by movePlayer (998): water 0.55, ice 1.10 (+momentum lerp), lava 0.80, void 0.0, _default 1.0.
stateObjects.fields: {water,ice,lava,void,_default}

stateObjects.name: COVER_MAX / COVER_COLOR / COVER_TRUNK / MOVE_BLOCK
stateObjects.role: Cover-object tables. COVER_MAX (49) = max concealment bonus per type: wall .85, boulder .75, alien_pod .72, dead_tree .68, tree .66, crate .62, barrel .60, ice_spike .55, cactus .50. COVER_COLOR (95) draw colors. MOVE_BLOCK (100) = {wall:true} — ONLY walls (plus void terrain) block movement; ALL cover types block line-of-sight.
stateObjects.fields: 9 cover types: tree, dead_tree, boulder, ice_spike, crate, barrel, cactus, wall, alien_pod

stateObjects.name: BIOME / BIOME_TERRAINS / BIOME_LABEL / BIOME_MEMBERS / BIOME_DRONE
stateObjects.role: Per-map mood. BIOME (141) has 6 entries (greenwood/dunes/tundra/downtown/xeno/bog) each {skyTop, skyBottom, moon, grade, ambCount, drifter:{spr,r,vx,vy,sway,drift,tw,a}}. BIOME_TERRAINS (149) maps terrain→biome (used by biomeOf fallback AND inverted at 603 into BIOME_MEMBERS for biome-medal completion). BIOME_LABEL (593) feeds medal skins; BIOME_DRONE (727) per-biome audio drone Hz.
stateObjects.fields: biomeKey/biome/skyCache globals at 152; round.biome set in startRound (2085)

stateObjects.name: LEVELS
stateObjects.role: Level manifest array. Entries {file, name, display, data, loaded, thumb} (+_loading, usedBaked). Filled by loadLevels(); baked 'Prototype Meadow' card is ALWAYS appended last (457). Drag-dropped maps are pushed after it (912). settings.lastLevel stores LEVELS.indexOf (2120, write-only).
stateObjects.fields: {file:string|null, name, display, data:scanner-map|null, loaded:bool, thumb:canvas|null}

stateObjects.name: MAP + derived grids
stateObjects.role: Active scanner map + derived state rebuilt by rebuildMapDerived(276): mapCols/mapRows/worldW/worldH (194), coverGrid[row][col]→type|null LAST-WINS per cell (195), wallGrid Uint8 (196), coverObjects [{type,col,row,wx,wy}] (197) used for coverBonus + drawing, terrainCanvas/terrainCtx baked world texture (198).
stateObjects.fields: scanner-map: {format:'scanner-map', version:1, name, grid:{cols,rows}, terrain:string[rows][cols] (terrain[y][x]), objects:[{x,y,type}], spawns:[{x,y,role:'hider'|'seeker'}]} — tile coords, world = (x+0.5)*TILE, TILE=32 (line 32)

stateObjects.name: BAKED_MAP
stateObjects.role: Offline-guarantee fallback map built by makeBakedMap() (424): 44x32 grass meadow with water/rock/foliage/sand/dirt/moss blobs, 8 hider + 4 corner seeker spawns, seeded mulberry32(20260719). Used whenever fetch of levels.json or a map file fails.
stateObjects.fields: same scanner-map shape; name 'Prototype Meadow'

stateObjects.name: opennessGrid / openCells
stateObjects.role: BFS distance-from-cover/void grid built by buildOpenness() (1134) right after setActiveMap in startRound. openCells = cells with openness>=2, non-void, walkable — the placement pool for UFO patrol waypoints (makePatrol 1151), TA beacons (2109), and Hunt-bot wander targets (2129). Fallback to any-walkable if <8 cells.
stateObjects.fields: Int8Array rows; openCells [{col,row,o}]

stateObjects.name: BLENDBOOK_KEYS / PROGRESS.blendbook / PROGRESS.biomeMedals
stateObjects.role: Progression tied to terrain: BLENDBOOK_KEYS = PRESET_ORDER minus void/lava = 14 loggable terrains. updateBlendBook (622) logs a terrain when truly vanished on it; checkBiomeMedals (635) grants medal_<biome> when every BIOME_MEMBERS terrain is logged. New terrains/biomes directly extend this progression surface.
stateObjects.fields: blendbook {terrainKey:{logged,bestMq,biome}}, biomeMedals {biomeKey:true}

stateObjects.name: window.__aac test hook
stateObjects.role: Headless/jsdom diagnostic getter. Exposes terrain: player.ref.dominantKey, tones list, levels: LEVELS.length, playerPos, ta beacon positions, hunt bot states — the smoke harness (per project memory) depends on it.
stateObjects.fields: getter returning plain-object snapshot

functions.name: terrainAt
functions.role: Grid accessor; MAP.terrain[row][col] || 'void'.

functions.name: coverTypeAt
functions.role: coverGrid accessor.

functions.name: blocksMove
functions.role: OOB || terrain==='void' || (cover && MOVE_BLOCK[type]). Movement collision base; circleBlocked(px,py) (986) sweeps it over the 12px player circle.

functions.name: terrainReference
functions.role: THE camo sampler + eyedropper source: overlap-area-weighted mean of pure TERRAIN_RGB over the 24x24px player footprint; tones = distinct terrain keys under footprint, heaviest first (single tone on uniform ground — byte-identical match, per Pass 8 invariant).

functions.name: matchQualityRef / effMatch
functions.role: Per-tone weighted match (seam tax) + Split Camo two-tone max-per-tone; capped by terrainMatchCap(ref.dominantKey). Shared by sim + studio coach.

functions.name: losClear
functions.role: Segment sampling every TILE*0.5; ANY cover cell blocks sight (271); ink clouds too; void does not block sight.

functions.name: rebuildMapDerived
functions.role: MAP → dims, coverGrid (last object wins per cell), wallGrid, coverObjects list, then buildTerrainCache().

functions.name: buildTerrainCache
functions.role: Bakes the FULL world (worldW x worldH px, OffscreenCanvas if available) once per map: per-tile dithered base fill (shadeHex ±DITHER_AMP=6, hashInt(col,row) deterministic) + terrainMotif + faint grid lines. Blitted culled-to-viewport at 1416-1419.

functions.name: terrainMotif
functions.role: Per-terrain texture switch (grass/moss blades, foliage blobs, rock facets, concrete seams, ice cracks, lava veins, crystal shards, water waves...). Amplitude clamped so the tile MEAN stays ≈ TERRAIN_HEX (camo-safe). New terrain with no case = plain dither, still valid.

functions.name: biomeOf
functions.role: Map name lowercase substring match against BIOME keys ('greenwood' in name → greenwood); fallback: dominant-terrain vote (sampled every 2 cells) through BIOME_TERRAINS.

functions.name: buildSky
functions.role: Caches viewport-sized sky gradient + moon glow from biome.skyTop/skyBottom/moon into skyCache; called in startRound (2086) and resize (2617).

functions.name: drawAmbientGround
functions.role: Terrain-driven emissive pass: lava/crystal/water glow, ice/snow sparkle, alien_pod purple glow (403-405). Capped at AMB_GLOW_MAX=110 sprites.

functions.name: makeBakedMap
functions.role: In-code fallback map (offline guarantee).

functions.name: loadLevels
functions.role: Builds BAKED_MAP, fetch('maps/levels.json'), pushes lazy manifest entries, ALWAYS appends baked card last. Called from boot() (2636); errors swallowed → title still loads on file://.

functions.name: fetchLevelData
functions.role: Lazy per-map fetch; validates only j.grid && Array.isArray(j.terrain); ANY failure silently returns BAKED_MAP and sets entry.usedBaked.

functions.name: setActiveMap
functions.role: MAP=map; rebuildMapDerived().

functions.name: buildThumb / ensureThumb
functions.role: Level-select thumbnails: TERRAIN_HEX per cell + dark px per object; ensureThumb (2416) lazy-fetches.

functions.name: terrainMatchCap / terrainConcealCap
functions.role: Terrain gameplay identity: lava caps match 0.35 / conceal 0.40; void 0; water conceal cap 0.90; crystal 0.92; default 0.99. Plus updateStillnessFor (2023): water ripple floor m>=0.35 while moving, ice settles 1.5x slower.

functions.name: coverBonus
functions.role: Best proximity bonus over ALL coverObjects, linear falloff within COVER_RADIUS=44px of object edge (TILE*0.42 circle).

functions.name: buildOpenness / makePatrol
functions.role: Openness BFS + patrol tour: 5-8 random openCells, nearest-neighbor ordered. Consumes the seeded rng stream.

functions.name: drawCover
functions.role: Per-type shape switch (tree/cactus circle, dead_tree cross, boulder/ice_spike diamond, crate X, barrel/alien_pod ring, wall square). Unknown type draws only a shadow — invisible.

functions.name: computeCamoFor
functions.role: Per-frame terrain→camo: a.ref=terrainReference; effMatch; onIce/inWater from ref.dominantKey; coverBonus; concealment capped by terrainConcealCap(dominantKey).

functions.name: selectLevel
functions.role: fetchLevelData → startRound directly (PRACTICE/HEAT/DAILY) or via DIFFICULTY_SELECT.

functions.name: startRound
functions.role: THE map-consuming hub: seeds rng, setActiveMap, buildOpenness, biomeOf, buildSky, picks spawns per mode, places TA beacons, seedAmbient last.

functions.name: respawnTA
functions.role: Time Attack respawn: re-picks a random hider spawn, -12s.

functions.name: startDaily / dailySeed
functions.role: DAILY level = pool[seed % pool.length] where pool = LEVELS.slice(0, length-1) (excludes the LAST entry, intended to be the baked card).

functions.name: drop handler
functions.role: Drag-drop SCANNER .json → parse, validate grid+terrain, inject default hider (center) / seeker (1,1) spawns if missing, push LEVELS entry, startRound PRACTICE.

functions.name: gen: makeMap
functions.role: Generator core: base-fill → blob() organic patches (LCG rngFactory, fuzzy radius ±0.8) → rectangular wall-ring buildings with 1 doorway (47-54) → density-scatter cover rules {type,on:[terrains],density} with per-cell dedupe 'seen' set (56-64) → spawns: open = non-hazard(water/lava/void+cfg.hazards) non-cover interior cells; 5 seekers snapped nearest to 4 corners+center points; 16 random hiders (66-81).

functions.name: gen: THEMES + main
functions.role: The 6 shipped maps: greenwood 72x54 seed 11, dunes 74x54 seed 22, tundra 72x54 seed 33, downtown 68x52 seed 44 (+14 buildings), xeno 72x54 seed 55, bog 70x52 seed 66. Writes maps/<name>.json + maps/levels.json manifest [{file,name,display}].

functions.name: validate-maps (untracked tool)
functions.role: Contract checker mirroring the game: format/version, dims, known terrain+cover keys, spawn presence/placement (hider not on water/lava/void/cover), flood-fill reachability >=60% of walkable + no stranded hider spawns. All 6 shipped maps currently pass 100% reachable.

flows: BOOT→TITLE: boot() (2625) fills TERRAIN_RGB from TERRAIN_HEX → loadLevels() (446): BAKED_MAP=makeBakedMap(); fetch('maps/levels.json'); for each manifest row push lazy LEVELS entry {file,name,display,data:null,loaded:false}; ALWAYS push baked 'Prototype Meadow' card last (457) → appState='TITLE'. fetch failure (file://) is swallowed → baked-only.

LEVEL SELECT→ROUND: route(mode) (2378) sets pendingMode → drawLevelSelect (2386) lays adaptive grid over LEVELS, ensureThumb (2416) lazily fetchLevelData+buildThumb (1px/tile) → tap → selectLevel(entry) (2066) awaits fetchLevelData (459; malformed/missing file silently swaps BAKED_MAP + usedBaked flag) → startRound directly (PRACTICE/HEAT/DAILY) or DIFFICULTY_SELECT → startRound(entry,mode,diff).

startRound MAP WIRING (2072-2121), exact order (rng-stream-critical): (1) seed = fixedSeed (DAILY=dailySeed yyyymmdd) or time^display.length hash; rng=mulberry32(seed) (2083). (2) setActiveMap(entry.data) → rebuildMapDerived (276): dims; per object clamp-check, coverGrid[o.y][o.x]=type (LAST wins), wallGrid for MOVE_BLOCK, coverObjects push with wx=(x+0.5)*TILE; buildTerrainCache (290) bakes full-world texture. (3) buildOpenness() (2084). (4) biomeKey=biomeOf(MAP.name); biome=BIOME[biomeKey]; round.biome (2085). (5) buildSky() (2086). (6) hiders/seekers=MAP.spawns.filter by role (2087); player at random hider via rng (2088). (7) mode HUNT: player at random seeker spawn, N=HIDER_COUNT[diff] bots at hiders[(i*2+1)%len] (2094-2102); else UFO_COUNT UFOs at seekers[i%len], each makeUfo→makePatrol consumes rng (2104-2105). (8) mode TA: beacons from openCells copy, reject <5 tiles from player or <6 tiles from other beacons, 200 tries max (2107-2116). (9) seedAmbient() LAST so drifters never consume the seeded stream (2117 — keeps DAILY reproducible). (10) settings.lastLevel=LEVELS.indexOf(entry) (2120).

TERRAIN→CAMO each fixed tick: computeCamoFor (2030): ref=terrainReference(x,y) (215: overlap-weighted mean of pure TERRAIN_RGB over 24px footprint + tones[]) → effMatch (246: per-tone weighted, split-camo max-per-tone, capped by terrainMatchCap(dominantKey) — lava 0.35/void 0) → updateStillnessFor (2023: inWater floor m=0.35, onIce tau*1.5) → coverBonus (493: nearest cover within 44px, COVER_MAX falloff) → concealment (502) capped min(0.99, terrainConcealCap(dominantKey)) → conspicuity. Same ref feeds eyedropper/MATCH (applyMatch 1060) and Hunt bots (2143).

TERRAIN→MOVEMENT: movePlayer (998): mult=MOVE_MULT[ref.dominantKey] (water 0.55, ice 1.10+momentum, lava 0.80); axis-separated integration vs circleBlocked (986) which sweeps blocksMove (208: void terrain or wall cover) over the player circle; clamp to world bounds.

RENDER each frame: applyScreenTransform → skyCache blit (1412) → world transform → terrainCanvas visible-slab blit (1416-1419, cull via visRect) → drawAmbientGround terrain glows (385: lava/crystal/water/ice/snow + alien_pod) → coverObjects drawn via drawCover (1475) → actors → overlays. Level thumbs separately via buildThumb.

DRAG-DROP CUSTOM MAP (902-916): window 'drop' → FileReader → JSON.parse → require j.grid && Array.isArray(j.terrain) else toast 'not a SCANNER map export' → if no hider spawn push {cols/2,rows/2,role:'hider'}; if no seeker push {1,1,'seeker'} → push LEVELS entry {file:null, display:name+' — dropped'} → pendingMode='PRACTICE'; startRound(entry,'PRACTICE',PRACTICE_DIFF) → toast.

DAILY: startDaily (2381): seed=dailySeed(); pool=LEVELS.slice(0,LEVELS.length-1); lv=pool[seed%pool.length]; fetchLevelData→startRound(lv,'DAILY',DIFF.NORMAL,seed) — same map+seed all day, retry cannot reroll (2073).

GENERATOR (tools/generate-levels.mjs): node tools/generate-levels.mjs → per THEME makeMap: fill base terrain → for each patch rule stamp count blobs at random centers r∈[minR,maxR] with fuzzy edge → buildings: 4-8-tile wall rectangles with one mid-side doorway → for each cover rule scatter type on matching terrain at density with dedupe → open-cell list (interior, non-hazard, uncovered) → 5 seekers nearest corner/center anchor points + 16 random hiders → write maps/<name>.json, then maps/levels.json manifest. Deterministic per seed.

BLEND BOOK / MEDALS (terrain progression): updateBlendBook (622) per tick: dominantKey ∈ BLENDBOOK_KEYS && mq>=0.85 && C<0.30 && S>=0.9 && maxSusp<0.85 held 1.0s → logBlend(key) (628) → checkBiomeMedals (635): all BIOME_MEMBERS[b] terrains logged → medal_<b> unlock + medal skin (595).
invariants: window.__aac hook (2641) must keep working — jsdom smoke harness (project memory) reads appState/terrain/tones/levels/ta/hunt from it; keep classic <script>, no modules, no external fetches beyond maps/.
Offline fallback must survive: loadLevels/fetchLevelData failures always resolve to BAKED_MAP; boot still reaches TITLE on file:// with no maps/ folder.

DAILY determinism: rng=mulberry32(seed) is a single consumed-in-order stream. setActiveMap/buildOpenness before spawn picks; makeUfo/makePatrol consume rng; seedAmbient() must remain AFTER all gameplay entity creation (2117). Any new random map-derived placement must use rng() and keep insertion order stable.

Camo math ground truth is TERRAIN_RGB, not pixels: terrainReference samples pure palette values, so buildTerrainCache/terrainMotif must keep each tile's visual MEAN ≈ TERRAIN_HEX (dither ±6, motif shades clamped ~±22). A new terrain's motif must not shift the mean or paint-to-match will visually lie.
Per-tone match invariant (Pass 8): on uniform ground tones=[{w:1}] and matchQualityRef === matchQuality byte-identically — calibration and existing tests depend on it.
Sight/movement split: EVERY cover cell blocks LoS (losClear 271); ONLY MOVE_BLOCK={wall} cover plus void terrain blocks movement (208). Void blocks movement but NOT sight.

scanner-map contract: {format:'scanner-map', version:1, name, grid:{cols,rows}, terrain[rows][cols] of known keys, objects:[{x,y,type}] known cover types, spawns with >=1 hider and >=1 seeker}. terrain is [y][x]; spawns/objects in tile coords; world = (x+0.5)*TILE, TILE=32.

Every map must have hider spawns on walkable non-hazard ground (not water/lava/void, not on cover) and the walkable region must be connected (validator threshold: flood-fill from a hider covers >=60% of walkable; no stranded hider spawns) — enforced by tools/validate-maps.mjs, which must be kept in sync with TERRAIN_HEX/COVER/MOVE_BLOCK tables.
The baked 'Prototype Meadow' card must remain the LAST LEVELS entry: startDaily's pool = LEVELS.slice(0, length-1) relies on it; loadLevels appends it after manifest entries.

biomeOf resolves by name substring first: shipped map names contain their biome key. round.biome is recorded into Blend Book entries; BIOME/BIOME_TERRAINS/BIOME_LABEL/BIOME_DRONE must stay key-consistent (BIOME_MEMBERS and medal skins are derived from them at boot).
gotchas: buildTerrainCache bakes the ENTIRE world at 32px/tile into one canvas (290). Shipped maps ≈74x54 → ~2368x1728 (~16MB RGBA). A 'serious bigger' map at 128x96 → 4096x3072 ≈ 48MB and a slow one-time bake; some mobile GPUs cap canvas at 4096px. Stay ≲110x80 per map or add chunked baking.

fetchLevelData fails SILENTLY to BAKED_MAP (467) — a typo'd terrain key won't crash but an unparseable/missing file just plays Prototype Meadow with only a suppressed PB badge (levelBadge 2384 checks usedBaked). Always run node tools/validate-maps.mjs after authoring.

coverGrid is last-object-wins per cell (283) but ALL objects land in coverObjects — two objects on one cell double-draw and double-count for coverBonus. The generator prevents this with its 'seen' set; hand-authored JSON must dedupe (x,y) too.

Unknown cover type = invisible: drawCover (1475) has no default shape branch (only a shadow), COVER_MAX lookup yields 0, yet it still blocks LoS. Unknown terrain key renders as void-colored fill and camo-samples as void (TERRAIN_RGB[key]||void at 224) — insidious, not fatal.
LAVA_DOT=2 (56) is a dead constant — lava deals no damage; its identity is match cap 0.35 + conceal cap 0.40 + 0.8x speed. Don't design maps assuming lava hurts.

Dropping a custom map breaks the 'baked last' assumption: drop pushes AFTER the baked card (912), so startDaily's slice then includes 'prototype' and excludes the dropped map. Harmless today but adding maps must go through maps/levels.json ordering, not runtime pushes.

openCells requires openness>=2 (two tiles from ANY cover or void, 1147). Dense hand-crafted cover mazes can starve it → <8 cells triggers the any-walkable fallback (1149) and UFO patrols/TA beacons/Hunt wander targets land right next to cover. TA additionally rejects beacons <5 tiles from spawn / <6 tiles apart with only 200 tries (2110) — a cramped map can silently spawn fewer than 5 beacons (win condition guards length, 2212, so it still works).
HUNT bot spawns use hiders[(i*2+1)%hiders.length] (2101) — with fewer hider spawns than ~2x bot count, bots stack on the same tile. Give big maps 16+ spread hider spawns (generator emits 16).
Generator treats water as a hazard for SPAWNS only (67) — water is playable (0.55 speed, conceal cap 0.90, ripple stillness floor). Hider spawns in water are flagged by the validator too.

Seeker spawn anchors in the generator include map center (74) — a seeker spawn can be adjacent to a hider spawn; SPAWN_GRACE=1.5s (70) is the only protection. For hand-crafted maps keep seekers near edges.
terrain[y][x] vs objects {x,y}: rows-first terrain, x/y-named objects. Easy to transpose when hand-writing JSON; validator catches row-width mismatches only.
