biomeOf substring match runs on the map NAME (356) — 'Downtown Rooftops' works, but a creatively named map ('Neon Alley') falls back to dominant-terrain voting, which for a concrete map still lands downtown; a mixed map may pick an unintended mood. There is no per-map biome field yet.
settings.lastLevel is a raw LEVELS index (2120) — adding manifest entries reorders it; currently write-only so safe, but don't start reading it for restore without switching to name keys.
extensionPoints: Add hand-crafted-feel maps WITHOUT touching index.html: author scanner-map JSON files in /workspaces/abduct_a_chameleon/maps/ and insert manifest rows {file,name,display} into maps/levels.json BEFORE the end (game appends baked card itself; keep display format 'Name — subtitle' since UI splits on '—' at 2410). The runtime is data-driven; nothing else needed for a new map on existing terrain/cover/biomes.

Grow the generator for crafted feel: extend makeMap in /workspaces/abduct_a_chameleon/tools/generate-levels.mjs (line 16). Add stamp primitives alongside blob(): carvePath(points,width,key) for rivers/roads, ring(cx,cy,r,key) for clearings, courtyard(x0,y0,w,h) reusing the building wall+doorway code (47-54) with interior terrain patches, and 'hide pocket' stamps (wall U-shapes whose interior cell carries a non-wall cover like crate/dead_tree → LoS-sealed but enterable). Add per-theme cfg fields and new THEMES entries (85) with larger cols/rows (~96x72 is safe) and hand-placed feature lists evaluated before random patches so seeds stay deterministic.

Alternatively add a sibling tool (e.g. tools/handcrafted-levels.mjs) that emits fully hand-specified scanner-maps (explicit terrain runs + curated spawns/cover) and MERGES its manifest rows into maps/levels.json ahead of generated ones; wire both into one npm-style script. Validate everything with node tools/validate-maps.mjs (already mirrors the runtime contract incl. reachability).

Creative hiding spots with existing mechanics: (a) two-tone seam pockets — butt two same-biome terrains (grass|foliage, snow|ice, mud|water edges) in 1-2 tile strips so Split Camo (SPLIT_MIN_W=0.18 second-tone weight, line 60) is rewarded; (b) cover clusters 1 tile apart create LoS shadows without blocking movement (only wall blocks); (c) crystal fields (conceal cap 0.92 + glow) as risk/reward; (d) water moats (speed 0.55 + ripple floor punishes moving, cap 0.90 rewards stillness); (e) walled courtyards with one doorway = beam-proof rooms UFOs must enter to see into.

New terrain type: add key to TERRAIN_HEX (122) + TERRAIN_NAME (126) + PRESET_ORDER (129) — that alone makes it playable (boot fills TERRAIN_RGB, motif falls back to dither). Optional identity hooks: MOVE_MULT (36), terrainMatchCap/terrainConcealCap (488-492), terrainMotif case (312, keep mean camo-safe), BIOME_TERRAINS (149, also enrolls it in a biome medal via BIOME_MEMBERS), drawAmbientGround glow branch (389) if emissive, footstep freq table (737), and the TERRAIN set in tools/validate-maps.mjs + the comment list in generate-levels.mjs. Note PRESET_ORDER growth affects the 8 keyboard digit shortcuts (1122) and Blend Book size (604).

New cover type: add to COVER_MAX (49), COVER_COLOR (95), a drawCover shape branch (1475), MOVE_BLOCK (100) only if it should be solid like wall, plus COVER set in validate-maps.mjs and generator cover rules. Remember: every cover type blocks LoS and zeroes openness around it (buildOpenness 1138).

Per-map explicit biome (for creatively named maps): change startRound line 2085 to biomeKey = MAP.biome || biomeOf(MAP.name); pass biome:'downtown' through in generator output (makeMap return, line 82) and allow the optional field in validate-maps.mjs. New biome moods = new BIOME entry (141) + BIOME_TERRAINS memberships (149) + BIOME_LABEL (593) + BIOME_DRONE (727); medal skin and BIOME_MEMBERS derive automatically (595, 603).

Curated seeker routes / beacon spots for hand-crafted maps: extend scanner-map with optional patrols:[[{x,y},...]] and beacons:[{x,y}] arrays; in makeUfo (1163) use MAP.patrols?.[i] (tile→world) instead of makePatrol, and in the startRound TA branch (2107) prefer MAP.beacons before the openCells scatter. Keep rng() call count identical on the no-field path to preserve DAILY determinism; add optional-field validation to validate-maps.mjs.

Bigger-map perf hook: if maps exceed ~110x80, modify buildTerrainCache (290) to bake N x N tile chunks (e.g. 32x32-tile canvases in a 2D array) and swap the single drawImage at 1416-1419 for a visible-chunk loop — everything else (terrainReference, thumbs, openness) already scales by grid math, not pixels.

Playtest loop without hosting: drag any authored .json onto the window (drop handler 904) for an instant PRACTICE run — it auto-injects missing spawns, so raw terrain sketches are testable early; per project memory there is no browser in-sandbox, so pair this with the jsdom smoke harness via window.__aac for automated checks.
